name: John Kasich
subject: Good progress, but...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I was disappointed to see Senate Democrats pass a resolution less than 24 hours later (without a single Republican vote) so they can begin drafting [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=16aa3b0b42854a47bc066d14274c8a79&_e=Azym4namyVTrGb3EvTQQvd_PJadTXUdjJDw4s91-FYY_BorEYE-pggL-5E-g1nbqglUdgyq2UYmm7QNpIQjrsaMkEsw_5--CggB82ONYfkmucIIxRyuCOfoCHEbbTFtkZjrwF3AKYDsJnMDTH4piXQ5nwbToEDdzieLF-wTAEg_cvl2akAAWWy-sR2PN-9zWGuMP0EXr2uqaQn-vvWN35_81qAwVp9BYelzG08Zb6Y3Ze8_PAel5_yCgejp2c1RmUf9JkB2Fgqbt4dIfdJAxCw%3D%3D) Peter - It was good to see Republicans and Democrats showing us that bipartisanship is still alive in Washington with the passage of the Senate's version of the infrastructure bill this week. As it now heads to the U.S. House, I still have concerns about how it will be paid for, but this is a good step forward, working together on something that will have a positive impact on all Americans. With that said, I was disappointed to see Senate Democrats pass a resolution less than 24 hours later (without a single Republican vote) so they can begin drafting the $3.5 TRILLION spending package that will significantly expand government. They seem to be tone deaf to America's rising inflation. People are seeing higher prices at the grocery store and many other places. The fact is, bad policy making is largely responsible for causing rising inflation. **Peter - you know that I have been a fiscal conservative my entire career**. Heck, I led the effort to balance America's federal budget and pay down debt while Chairman of the House Budget Committee. **What I see now with a runaway national debt, expanded deficit spending and inflation scares me and it should scare you too**. This will kill jobs, result in higher taxes, make things cost more and increase the burden we put on our children and future generations because our leaders failed to make the difficult decisions now. **I'm out there every day raising awareness about these issues and doing what I can to make a positive impact** \- to restore sanity to Washington. [But I need your help to keep up the fight](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=16aa3b0b42854a47bc066d14274c8a79&_e=Azym4namyVTrGb3EvTQQvep5OncjRr7TcgyHq0F7w9-erBjCvd6EuhpnRFR2LRawUxPJalpG9ccB3QysnG_PuJWy3pgByrh8fEjW_8kAR7N6xloap0aoYmgggSR52xsAph3IX0zYTZSLJBxqduj4Pc8cJAWKpTZbcsj6v88ep9vs2nUX1xjWZhPU-VNIPaRxZ-aerQUMlrApL01CIMDeUrB5_8aAD96pOR0xPxFCD71Fjjz0eXFw_hW7-1fyMr30K7ksKlYeK4ovtQim68--NA%3D%3D). The funds we raise go directly into our advocacy efforts and that's why I'm reaching out today to [ask you to consider making a donation right now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=16aa3b0b42854a47bc066d14274c8a79&_e=Azym4namyVTrGb3EvTQQvep5OncjRr7TcgyHq0F7w9-erBjCvd6EuhpnRFR2LRawoPk5H3QX2nugIKQCJnDArlGJjtdfGD1GA_U7Xk2_Wc6dX8iZdokcfRUJU7s5rxfUCy27JWNceWXAAF-bAMknvtbL_npyIngU-C9B2hvJNUJofIBpVPQrzbUk3p2_LB3RC0fKc7vElVkYzJJLbcpZZnWfuAiyxfOLhFge6yQf43zOYkzn9-Z-uyFh1MXojP-d42cNyZJoZQ7U0g7-CucaOQ%3D%3D) to help. I'm counting on you. [Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=16aa3b0b42854a47bc066d14274c8a79&_e=Azym4namyVTrGb3EvTQQvep5OncjRr7TcgyHq0F7w9-erBjCvd6EuhpnRFR2LRawtQ154rfVEWyfdWC6lpr_rdrgG56O5NQWo8W5ObArMHaMpjfBj1A563Vx8d3pWze-s2ULIn4KEZEuwlndu_pftk_ZMj-vMAexBkDBsIfBeM3JMqhwMH2DMm6Z0byAGdeXCx6T2kUW-Musa61FRBL0JGBzw7d_zuMwl5_EBcQKgF1ugBYk9HCbxAMc2-QwfKSQSuRQV5FrSpIQsloY6uXzUQ%3D%3D) I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country and fight against these dangerous, job-killing policies. Thank you! -John Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any

name: Senate Republicans
subject: SPENDING EXTRAVAGANZA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because... |
---
Peter,

Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because, hey, **what’s another $3 trillion more when we’re so far in the hole that we’re probably never going to be able to balance the budget again?**

**The spending is preposterous** , especially when you consider that Senate DEMS hold the narrowest majority in DECADES. Don’t tell that to Chuck Schumer or Bernie Sanders though. They’re preparing to tee up the most radical legislation since the New Deal passed under FDR. Yet, they have nowhere close to the majority DEMS did 70 years ago.

The thing about the Sanders/Schumer SPENDING EXTRAVAGANZA is that this **isn’t targeted spending**. They’re throwing JELLO against a wall and seeing what they can get to stick. ANYTHING AND EVERYTHING IS FAIR GAME.

**We cannot express to you enough how dire this situation is that we find ourselves in** , and we need to hear what you think.

**[Do you support this MASSIVE EXPANSION OF GOVERNMENT? subject: I’m going to lose my damn voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XhTzpepqYVD87BcGKwhPxvs7iszjmXUOuj6gUrv9K5OrtDcWjxNVU7Jg4u7Onc9le7LcCymFAWPHA586Z1W1ICE5tEYEyNhERKscS1cBv5bWbAGLB9NWohlphaIYFkK19_ZNrM9DlZLADF_uTbnYTLyy-_bVqkBnHyD5HPwZ7Uk5ahBVy_iPxMYGJOwEI-ISTzM7DBZptR5KcIaAKRA2G0ebbwls9ib34yJ8fXRKz7iW8tDfevJ7hy3JUw09V04NCgnTmhnBxSgvtVkB0XzuGj4EWR8H_OihMNnIfbr1gJkh/3ef/l1QjYxarSOm3bn03wbwg7A/h0/NGZr-jZILwfsKKtU1ECYtyphlvh1IMjdeuh4Pw0CKuo)
Derek, I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice!

I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay, for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor.

Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s deadline is tomorrow night, and I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own.

[**Our fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to flip this Senate seat so that we can start getting big things done for the American people. So Derek, will you split a few bucks between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us reach our critical goal before the clock runs out?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XhTzpepqYVD87BcGKwhPxvuqBV2L-OA0grRAM05SDVTtUlWMs530MIlI29zK2uBpQDYP6Zg9ZEU5fogj0m1-aOaRYxEDvpHiNhO_gdUJpsBrosIM3_HowoYPdLwmnLYmbbJ72To_MRfZ2n7LWwl_b0s7BIF1C3Fd7Ds12hvXXKimUlwAnuqyuzOlcrYQPtToJ_NZ-zzAAelcCWhkr71gcLaNZPJZ_mmBC6R-OFaxSBRBOuf_pMPbcT1GoaQaLs_mo3XV6U2KLnkjpjS7V-SQIIpMdZAcgmzSuhniZ29Sot6l/3ef/l1QjYxarSOm3bn03wbwg7A/h1/R8atw5js-HcXmlWJn-qYISdNXGAl555SCz77cadaaAs) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XhTzpepqYVD87BcGKwhPxvvBCw0awPg1vDHeoXpHl6DhWk8JL0b1QQlWFG5R3TtWPlVmIteMsdlP3fE-CGUg21RZHOV1cSlhI9A3lbiT-1SpPHZz4z7BNXGtgDjvzuQQ9JZO-uzjw5wcPM-xsw7MSOjnFXRjMtURPLI5gJozLgiudUg77ZEjHtyvw7tGrocyuzAFysg8ZTxJwSmZIyDoJ_fB8d4gJwRhuXVedHqQvQrTkGZ9Y0HznjNuHmnA-LHaT_lpvTOH0lOSKIWsUkmQM_AIaU0kHNWj3Q3qIejSXbzQ/3ef/l1QjYxarSOm3bn03wbwg7A/h2/bIwxiLUPrgfOLyB-s7TPOgnMAuxJRSeFuMNJk1-q1So)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: None of Your Business
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Are you vaccinated? Did you decide to "do your part" to protect others from the scary Delta Variant? Don't answer that. It's none of my business.
## And guess what...it's not the business of government or private businesses either!
We are losing all sense of boundaries in this country and state right now. Forced vaccinations are happening as I write this email. Health freedom is under massive assault. If we don't stand up right now, we will lose so much. And Action 4 Liberty has a plan that we'll be telling you about next week. Stay tuned. **In the mean time, please sign this petition and pass it along to friends and family!** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=2) It's critically important that we do NOT cower to authoritarians who want to remove our basic health freedoms. **News is starting to come out that the State Fair is going to require masks. They also might join the growing movement of anti-liberty businesses who want to require vaccinations.** Well we, at Action 4 Liberty, will NOT comply! Our health status is none of their business and we are not going to force our volunteers and staff to wear pointless masks. I don't care if Action 4 Liberty is the only booth at the State Fair that doesn't conform to their demands. We will STAND UP for what we believe in! If you feel compelled to lead by example with us, and show fair-goers that there is a courageous stance in defying these ludicrous orders, I would be honored to have you volunteer for a shift at our booth. **All participants get a free ticket to the fairgrounds and an Action 4 Liberty t-shirt. Please join us between August 26th and September 6th by registering here.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=3 "Volunteer") [Volunteer](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=3)
---
If you can't make it, don't worry, there are other ways to help. The State Fair is costly and we could use [your help](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=4) to get our message out to the 2 million fair-goers.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=5 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=5)
---
The authoritarians in our government and corporations are trying to turn you and me into second class citizens. If you are unvaccinated, you have less rights in their world.
## We can't let this happen!
**Let's stand up to these authoritarians who want to run over our health freedom. Join us by[volunteering](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=6) at the State Fair booth or by donating to [help fund our message to 2 million fair-goers](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=7).**
And stay tuned next week for how we plan to STOP forced vaccinations in this state!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=none_of_your_business&n=10), software for leaders.

name: Senate Republicans
subject: SPENDING EXTRAVAGANZA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because... |
---
Fellow American,

Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because, hey, **what’s another $3 trillion more when we’re so far in the hole that we’re probably never going to be able to balance the budget again?**

**The spending is preposterous** , especially when you consider that Senate DEMS hold the narrowest majority in DECADES. Don’t tell that to Chuck Schumer or Bernie Sanders though. They’re preparing to tee up the most radical legislation since the New Deal passed under FDR. Yet, they have nowhere close to the majority DEMS did 70 years ago.

The thing about the Sanders/Schumer SPENDING EXTRAVAGANZA is that this **isn’t targeted spending**. They’re throwing JELLO against a wall and seeing what they can get to stick. ANYTHING AND EVERYTHING IS FAIR GAME.

**We cannot express to you enough how dire this situation is that we find ourselves in** , and we need to hear what you think.

**[Do you support this MASSIVE EXPANSION OF GOVERNMENT? If you think this is as big of a mistake as we do, then for the love of this country, please let us know right now](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c2a169194ff64e4abc4dc5d205009e97&_e=V1aWS_RR0l-KI90jfdAS7vOwp_D0YweO00N92QzRENcT2w__jJeQbd2EC2SDImbFjnKEQWkHqc3nyuLYh76JWozTQdJ7XzCXCqxniY-dHoxRi93KCNBtpxHZ5ZSeVszPo6GVu_JciqClUH5LkUBFqdz1xXRdNeGVBb99uPBwzk1nYbxWim3-mNN_RGihvqH3lcU1FlWO-6qkRR9AkHLoarpSZaoTZgNAioRKXBDqE6xrboY4jB4mwDb8HF6XNa0Ci65COO8AtwdXJU3s0yXD5A07Tn3AqqwATtAaEmRWYSswzbp06IqHzaSMVdfb-XD9mNeJkHnuTV6sn4NINoQEjb5ETsCwkD8jx0GS4gB1OddnyodiJUAzbgaxFwghzWnwrGj-2mWlkA4zAtSZMaJi5-hWU_0GyXJFEgn_BvIbYhM1IsmKtCXOilKQ_s2QvbC2XXHf3a_NjVghCIiY3cy7UAmduZrGsrarJVodwSHzHBc%3D)**.

clean_body: Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because... | Fellow American, Our federal debt is now north of $27 trillion dollars, yet Democrats want to add an additional $3 trillion dollars to it because, hey, what’s another $3 trillion more when we’re so far in the hole that we’re probably never going to be able to balance the budget again? The spending is preposterous , especially when you consider that Senate DEMS hold the narrowest majority in DECADES. Don’t tell that to Chuck Schumer or Bernie Sanders though. They’re preparing to tee up the most radical legislation since the New Deal passed under FDR. Yet, they have nowhere close to the majority DEMS did 70 years ago. The thing about the Sanders/Schumer SPENDING EXTRAVAGANZA is that this isn’t targeted spending. They’re throwing JELLO against a wall and seeing what they can get to stick. ANYTHING AND EVERYTHING IS FAIR GAME. We cannot express to you enough how dire this situation is that we find ourselves in , and we need to hear what you think. . 1. Shutting down American energy 2. Expanding Obamacare 3. FREE COMMUNITY COLLEGE (no repayment plan for those that drop out) 4. GREEN CARDS FOR ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS This is certainly not what American voters said they wanted. name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: ALERT: Recall ballots being mailed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Some counties have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now! | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58122750:JIGYb4lXN:m:1:3253819041:DF60C9720DD1A0B716497A963FC84D18:r)

---
Peter,

Vote-by-mail ballots for California's recall election against failed leftist Governor Gavin Newsom will be mailed to **every registered voter** by August 16th - _just days away._

_**But some counties - including Los Angeles and Fresno - have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now!**_

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58122750:JIGYb4lXN:m:1:3253819041:DF60C9720DD1A0B716497A963FC84D18:r)
Even though election day isn't officially until September 14th, once voters have their mail ballots **they will cast their votes.**

We need your help to get the word out and help voters understand that before they can elect a new governor of California, **they must first VOTE YES TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM.**

* * *
**QUESTION #1: RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM?
☑ YES**
* * *

Even **Sean Hannity** agrees, Gavin Newsom must be recalled - _" By the way, I support the recall . . . Let me be very clear."_

[**Voting in the recall is officially underway now - please chip in $25, $50, $100 or even more to fund the Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee's voter outreach and make sure Californians recall Newsom.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58122750:JIGYb4lXN:m:1:3253819041:DF60C9720DD1A0B716497A963FC84D18:r)

Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager

name: Chief James Craig
subject: don’t tell us to “suck it up”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r) | |
---
Peter,

**What is the Left 's response to our concerns about rising crime in the wake of the Defund the Police movement?**

__**Tell us to "suck it up."**__

I'm not exaggerating. That is a DIRECT quote from Rep. Cori Bush, one of the most outspoken advocates of defunding the police.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)

It's shameful. It's just another example of the "rules for thee and not for me" politicians across this country.

**My name is Chief James Craig, and I am the former Detroit Chief of Police. Not only do I reject the call to "Defund the Police," I believe we have a public safety crisis in America - and it's time we gave the police even MORE support.**

We all deserve to feel safe in our communities - not just those who can afford their own private security.

Peter, it's past time that our leaders started taking our public safety crisis seriously. I believe it's time to act.

And it's part of why the Michigan governor's race is attracting national attention: because I'm a veteran police chief who is unafraid to stand up to the elites when it comes to our police.

I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of that team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)**
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

**And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!"**

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124424:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124425:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124426:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124427:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

_P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-171745](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124423:6XAQ24lNT:m:1:3253819041:D914368BC90F419435BD1FE57B40B3DF:r)**_

I know their true face, and that makes me a danger to them, so they are coming after me, and **[I need your help to fight off the attacks from the child sexual predators.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58126127:67V2E4lNa:m:1:3103520637:56F38A01A94668021F2E927EDF09A6D9:r "I need your help to fight off the attacks from the child sexual predators.")** Their 2020 ads may have swung thousands of votes towards Joe Biden, and progressive candidates for Congress in crucial swing states and DC Establishment groups gave them awards for their efforts. **But, even after they were busted using donor money to groom interns for their married founder, all is forgiven if they target _patriots_ for defeat.** _Now, they are joining forces with Joe Biden 's CRT bureaucrats and taking their efforts directly to your children. As soon as their teacher is done telling them how racist they are, the Lincoln Project can take over to teach them their twisted version of "civics."_ [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58126127:67V2E4lNa:m:1:3103520637:56F38A01A94668021F2E927EDF09A6D9:r "Headline") **The Lincoln Project is plotting to take down anyone who will stand up to them - _and I am their top target_! They know I am not afraid - not afraid of them, not afraid of Old Joe, not afraid of Nancy Pelosi or their friends in the liberal media.** **[I AM NOT AFRAID, and you aren't either, which is why we must put an end to their perversion and save America from RINOs and Socialists.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58126127:67V2E4lNa:m:1:3103520637:56F38A01A94668021F2E927EDF09A6D9:r "I AM NOT AFRAID, and you aren’t either, which is why we

name: Mark Warner
subject: Don’t let Trump use Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33977499/300537720/-2023814932?refcode=20210813.1_MW_8BA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTZiMDdiMi0yNWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hM6aPbtlIsst-CldMzGjKwUVuI7bqGE78dh5YB0pUUQ=)

| | Derek, if we’re not careful, Donald Trump’s 2024 comeback will start in Virginia.

Just look at the numbers:

In 2020, Virginia voters came together and helped Joe Biden defeat Donald Trump by **ten points.**

But now, Terry’s opponent has been endorsed by Donald Trump three times. Polls show he’s within just **two points** of catching Terry McAuliffe.

We’re trending the wrong way, and we’ve got to do everything we can to turn this around.

**_[I’m asking you directly because this is important. name: Bill Hagerty
subject: They turned their backs on you passing this “Infrastructure Bill”, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HAGERTY
body:

| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124697:JbHtG4lrN:m:1:3253819041:C7AC4262B558D67617EBC055B18F4AF7:r)
---
| Peter,

---
On Thursday night, the **Democrats tried to ram their wasteful, corrupt "infrastructure" bill** through the Senate...

...and **EVERY SINGLE SENATOR but me** was ready to **let them pass it without a fight.** (I couldn't believe what I was seeing, Peter)

So I stood up and fought it. _**By myself.**_

I've only been in the Senate a few months, but never in my wildest nightmares did I expect **_every single Senate Republican but me_ to _betray_ conservative values** like that.

It's clear: we have **TWO fights** to win in 2022:
1. Stop the bleeding... by **defeating the Democrats** and taking back the Senate.

2. Start rebuilding America... by electing a **tidal wave of principled conservatives** who aren't afraid to fight for this nation.

**I won last night 's fight by myself, Peter.** **[But I can't do it alone forever... not without the support of patriots like you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58124697:JbHtG4lrN:m:1:3253819041:C7AC4262B558D67617EBC055B18F4AF7:r "But I can’t
do it alone forever... not without the support of patriots like you.")**

you’re on.")**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Just. Say. No.
body:
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI1LTdlOGY3NTY4MDMyZjQ2MGFiNzA2YzhhNTJmYmZmOTBl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTc2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=K84FAwpmYUsDL8PJ7JB_sg) I wrote to you Wednesday about our upcoming [**Just Say No to unAmerican medical mandates protests,** **protests,**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI1LTdlOGY3NTY4MDMyZjQ2MGFiNzA2YzhhNTJmYmZmOTBl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTc2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=c3263WvYY67SzGj7lH7Xbg) happening nationwide on Saturday, August 28th. [**Will you organize a protest in your area?**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI1LTdlOGY3NTY4MDMyZjQ2MGFiNzA2YzhhNTJmYmZmOTBl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTc2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=HKWkVxAQU9__UQusCZbZjg) It does not need to be a big, complicated event, but your freedom is truly at stake, and we need a show of force. This is going to take all of us to step up and do what needs to be done. [ORGANIZE A RALLY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI1LTdlOGY3NTY4MDMyZjQ2MGFiNzA2YzhhNTJmYmZmOTBl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTc2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=1qYdkFWOsZeI2WKUSVIC2w) We can’t wait for someone else to plan it. It’s you and I who must get it done. OpenVAERS is a website that takes data straight from the Health and Human Services’ Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System and makes it easier to search. They put out a recent action alert, and the way they described what’s at stake is exactly right. Take a look – _In the last few days, President Biden and NIAID Director Tony Fauci have stated that they expect the Pfizer mRNA shot to get full FDA approval soon (likely before Labor Day). It is completely unethical for them to weigh in on this matter given that the FDA review is ongoing. It shows that the process is political and not based on science. It also tells us that we only have about 22 days to stop this from happening._ _ _ _If the FDA gives full approval to the Pfizer mRNA shot it will be like the creation of the Berlin Wall and we will live behind a**Pharma Iron Curtain** going forward. Full approval will be used to justify all manner of totalitarian restrictions on daily life: school mandates, military mandates, corporate mandates, v passports, travel restrictions, restrictions on Social Security benefits, the list is endless and terrifying._ I think OpenVAERS is right. Those who want to use Covid to consolidate power over us will try to create an “iron curtain” to punish and control those who just say no. Whether it’s no to masks, no to a forced vaccine, no to lockdowns, or no to forced isolation, they want to separate us from the rest of society and punish us. We have a short time to stop this before it is solidified. Make no mistake, we will keep fighting, no matter what. But, it is easier to fight now. It will only get harder. **Additionally,[please consider a gift of $25, $50, or $100](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI1LTdlOGY3NTY4MDMyZjQ2MGFiNzA2YzhhNTJmYmZmOTBl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9mdW5kMT0yNSZmdW5kMj01MCZmdW5kMz0xMDAmbWlkPTQ0MTc2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=qgEobeT2_yRf3GmlzQT9Ig) to help us recruit organizers and promote their protests.** If Europe can turn out hundreds of thousands of protestors, then surely America can too! Even if you’ve never organized a rally before, **you can do this.** And, we will be here to help you every step of the way. [Sign up today](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI1LTdlOGY3NTY4MDMyZjQ2MGFiNzA2YzhhNTJmYmZmOTBl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTc2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=j3mRk0cG-kR0XkX0AWYmSw) to Just Say No to unAmerican medical mandates (and say yes to freedom)! [ORGANIZE A RALLY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI1LTdlOGY3NTY4MDMyZjQ2MGFiNzA2YzhhNTJmYmZmOTBl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTc2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=jf5Ok_JkPCTzi1nZFVzRcw) The Winston Churchill quote below sums it up best, and it’s why I am including it in every email I send about the Just Say No protests. As I said above, it’s not going to get easier to fight for our freedoms. It will only get harder. _If you will not fight for right when you can easily win without bloodshed; if you will not fight when your victory is sure and not too costly; you may come to the moment when you will have to fight with all the odds against you and only a precarious chance of survival. There may even be a worse case. You may have to fight when there is no hope of victory, because it is better to perish than to live as slaves._ Honored to stand and fight with you, Jenny Beth Martin | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI1LTdlOGY3NTY4MDMyZjQ2MGFiNzA2YzhhNTJmYmZmOTBl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9mdW5kMT0yNSZmdW5kMj01MCZmdW5kMz0xMDAmbWlkPTQ0MTc2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=JUbS4Dwpl5gXGG9ZEWE58w)
|
---

clean_body: I wrote to you Wednesday about our upcoming happening nationwide on Saturday, August 28th. It does not need to be a big, complicated event, but your freedom is truly at stake, and we need a show of force. This is going to take all of us to step up and do what needs to be done. We can’t wait for someone else to plan it. It’s you and I who must get it done. OpenVAERS is a website that takes data straight from the Health and Human Services’ Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System and makes it easier to search. They put out a recent action alert, and the way they described what’s at stake is exactly right. Take a look – In the last few days, President Biden and NIAID Director Tony Fauci have stated that they expect the Pfizer mRNA shot to get full FDA approval soon (likely before Labor Day). It is completely unethical for them to weigh in on this matter given that the FDA review is ongoing. It shows that the process is political and not based on science. It also tells us that we only have about 22 days to stop this from happening. If the FDA gives full approval to the Pfizer mRNA shot it will be like the creation of the Berlin Wall and we will live behind aPharma Iron Curtain going forward. Full approval will be used to justify all manner of totalitarian restrictions on daily life: school mandates, military mandates, corporate mandates, v passports, travel restrictions, restrictions on Social Security benefits, the list is endless and terrifying. I think OpenVAERS is right. Those who want to use Covid to consolidate power over us will try to create an “iron curtain” to punish and control those who just say no. Whether it’s no to masks, no to a forced vaccine, no to lockdowns, or no to forced isolation, they want to separate us from the rest of society and punish us. We have a short time to stop this before it is solidified. Make no mistake, we will keep fighting, no matter what. But, it is easier to fight now. It will only get harder. Additionally, to help us recruit organizers and promote their protests. If Europe can turn out hundreds of thousands of protestors, then surely America can too! Even if you’ve never organized a rally before, you can do this. And, we will be here to help you every step of the way. to Just Say No to unAmerican medical mandates (and say yes to freedom)! The Winston Churchill quote below sums it up best, and it’s why I am including it in every email I send about the Just Say No protests. As I said above, it’s not going to get easier to fight for our freedoms. It will only get harder. If you will not fight for right when you can easily win without bloodshed; if you will not fight when your victory is sure and not too costly; you may come to the moment when you will have to fight with all the odds against you and only a precarious chance of survival. There may even be a worse case. You may have to fight when there is no hope of victory, because it is better to perish than to live as slaves. Honored to stand and fight with you, Jenny Beth Martin | | | Tea Party Patriots Action operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 , All rights reserved. 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

name: James Hartnett
subject: Restoring faith in our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
Stewart deployed in 2005 to support the first democratic elections in Iraq. He witnessed families risking their lives to ensure their voices were heard. He understands how essential the right to vote is to our democracy. In Congress, he will always stand up against partisan attacks on voting.
In order to restore trust in our democracy, we have to send Stewart to Congress. We have to win so that we can restore faith in our democracy, protect the right to vote, expand access to healthcare and so much more.
That’s why we’ve set up the Flip The First Fund. It will be open until 11:59 pm on Monday night, and we need to bring in 100 donations by then. Can you chip in $10 today to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-ftff?refcode=210812-email&amount=10]
It’s critical we have a representative who shares our values and respects the will of the people. Stewart will be that representative.
Chip in any amount to our Flip The First Fund now, and do your part to send Stewart to Washington! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-ftff?refcode=210812-email]
Thank you so much,
James Hartnett
Finance Director
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.
CONTRIBUTE >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-ftff?refcode=210812-email] CONTRIBUTE $25 MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-ftff?refcode=210812-email&amount=25&recurring=true]PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

name: James Carville
subject: Absolutely crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33996557/300587303/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI4MDRiZC00N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z3YN_94p32WLhGy3NNjyaWmNl2zw5ai7pesaFus5Pw4=)
Before you log off for the weekend, I wanted to send over a note outlining one of the most powerful ways you can support Democrats right now. Since Democrats regained control of the Senate, we’ve been moving fast to pass legislation to help people across the country. We passed a $1.9 trillion stimulus bill to jumpstart our economy, speed up vaccinations, and support families with an expanded Child Tax Credit — _all without a single Republican vote!_ But I’ve seen some scary polls in recent months that should set off alarm bells for Democrats. If we’re not able to turn the tide in our direction, we could find ourselves looking at Mitch McConnell with the Senate gavel when the Senate reconvenes after the upcoming midterms. **I’m asking personally: Chip in to Defend the Senate to help protect our Democratic Senate majority. Hi there, Did you get a chance to read my email? Republicans have decided that their best shot at taking back the Senate is by flipping this seat. Most recently, right-wing billionaire and Trump's former Education Secretary **Betsy DeVos announced she would visit New Hampshire in yet another attempt to rally Trump's base and smear my name.** During her failed tenure in the Trump administration, **Ms. DeVos worked tirelessly to dismantle our public education system, while ignoring the needs of students and educators.** I'm working hard to strengthen our public schools and correct the Trump administration’s failed policies because I believe that every child deserves the opportunity to receive a high-quality education. But I can't do that if Republicans succeed in flipping this seat. News outlets across the country have labeled me the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection, and in 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes. If we're going to win in 2022, it's going to take a grassroots effort. **[That's why I'm reaching out to my top supporters, friend, to ask if you can make a $5 donation. From: Maggie Hassan
Date: Thu, August 12, 2021
Subject: This is longer, but I hope you'll read

This is a longer email, friend, but I hope you'll read it.
Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, is coming to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red.
During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. **At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.**
Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration -- pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, **DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system.**
I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' upcoming visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. **If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority.**
Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. **[I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our mid-month fundraising goal, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. Will you please rush $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33997881/300592605/565612021?refcode=e20210813_devos-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTA1NmYyMi00YmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3jiBjrdGDMUNl3e0few2qvqYsxaJVHl9zYSqXg1Nl4=)**

clean_body: | | | Hi there, Did you get a chance to read my email? Republicans have decided that their best shot at taking back the Senate is by flipping this seat. Most recently, right-wing billionaire and Trump's former Education Secretary Betsy DeVos announced she would visit New Hampshire in yet another attempt to rally Trump's base and smear my name. During her failed tenure in the Trump administration, Ms. DeVos worked tirelessly to dismantle our public education system, while ignoring the needs of students and educators. I'm working hard to strengthen our public schools and correct the Trump administration’s failed policies because I believe that every child deserves the opportunity to receive a high-quality education. But I can't do that if Republicans succeed in flipping this seat. News outlets across the country have labeled me the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection, and in 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes. If we're going to win in 2022, it's going to take a grassroots effort. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Maggie Hassan Date: Thu, August 12, 2021 Subject: This is longer, but I hope you'll read This is a longer email, friend, but I hope you'll read it. Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, is coming to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law. Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration -- pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system. I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' upcoming visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority. Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = I'm fighting to give New Hampshire families a brighter future by strengthening public education, expanding the Child Tax Credit, protecting health care, and more. body:
| | | **Florida is one of the states most likely to determine Senate control, friend, but I'm still falling short of my $300,000 End of Month fundraising goal.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33998402/300594441/298981188?refcode=20210812_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ4NjAwMC00ZGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMUtmxPZEsNRfwcH0GOtiITh2QOzU3UBfItXE2NVxQk=)** This is the worst time for me to fall short of my can't-miss goal. The Florida GOP is preparing to launch a massive voter registration drive with the goal of flipping Florida red _permanently_. And between the Senate Republican campaign arm and Marco Rubio himself, the GOP has hauled in more than $32 million to flip the Senate for Mitch McConnell. So even though The Cook Political Report increased my chances of winning, I have a steep mountain to climb to catch up to the GOP's advantage in Florida. Since this grassroots team is so strong, I know that if we muster our willpower and dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. And right now, digging deep means hitting these grassroots fundraising goals today and all the way to Election Day. [**So please, friend, I urgently need you to help me make up this shortfall before the month is up. The Florida GOP is preparing to launch a massive voter registration drive with the goal of flipping Florida red permanently. And between the Senate Republican campaign arm and Marco Rubio himself, the GOP has hauled in more than $32 million to flip the Senate for Mitch McConnell. So even though The Cook Political Report increased my chances of winning, I have a steep mountain to climb to catch up to the GOP's advantage in Florida. Since this grassroots team is so strong, I know that if we muster our willpower and dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. ---
| Patriot, Amanda Makki understands what it means to represent you in Congress. That's why she wants to hear what issues matter the most, directly from you! To that end, we have a quick survey to help us gauge what conservatives feel are the **TOP ISSUES** facing America today. Will you help Amanda and the team get a clear picture of what you, the voters and supporters, believe the country’s priorities are by taking just a few minutes to complete our short survey?
---
| [WHAT IS YOUR TOP ISSUE?](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5b1fefd96d&e=c2296cffff "WHAT IS YOUR TOP ISSUE?")

| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=4343059f33&e=c2296cffff)
---
| As Amanda Makki looks to flip Florida's 13th District **_RED_** , and make it ground zero for taking back the House, **_YOUR_** interests are going to be the priority in this mission. [**_We hope you’ll take just a few minutes to let us know what those are!_**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=084a0c617c&e=c2296cffff) Whether it’s stopping the spread of Socialism in Joe Biden’s America, stopping Critical Race Theory from being taught in schools, pushing for Voter ID laws, securing our Southern Border, or some other issue, there’s a number of important topics that are going to shape this race in FL-13 _and_ shape our country’s future. **Let us know which one is your TOP priority, and Amanda will get to work tackling it head on!** Thank you in advance for taking the short survey below!
---

| For Florida and America, _Team Amanda_

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33999284/300599195/1655561428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NGEyYjk5LTRmZmMtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HaNwDjvmBUbPxckUYrMEHHw4oZUQKURWErbi9QsBBQo=&emci=1a398928-41fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=144a2b99-4ffc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2038134) Dear Friend, Abortions are health care. That's why we're supporting our partner organization, Women's Medical Fund, in their weeklong [Anti-Abortion Center](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33999287/300599201/1901375693?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NGEyYjk5LTRmZmMtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HaNwDjvmBUbPxckUYrMEHHw4oZUQKURWErbi9QsBBQo=&emci=1a398928-41fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=144a2b99-4ffc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2038134) (AACs) campaign to fight fake abortion clinics. AACs (“crisis pregnancy centers” or “fake clinics”) use taxpayer money to lie to and manipulate pregnant people who are considering abortion. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of Real Alternatives, the large institution that funds these AACs. **Let's shut them down!** Women's Medical Fund is wrapping up its **Week of Action** on August 13th, and could really use our support. You can help by:
* Boosting social media posts found on Instagram at [@womensmedfund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33999288/300599204/2005369839?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NGEyYjk5LTRmZmMtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HaNwDjvmBUbPxckUYrMEHHw4oZUQKURWErbi9QsBBQo=&emci=1a398928-41fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=144a2b99-4ffc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2038134)

* Distributing the one-pager: [womensmedicalfund.org/organizing](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33999289/300599207/1901375693?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0NGEyYjk5LTRmZmMtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HaNwDjvmBUbPxckUYrMEHHw4oZUQKURWErbi9QsBBQo=&emci=1a398928-41fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=144a2b99-4ffc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2038134)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I'm running to represent working folks, not CEOs and big money.
#

Friend,
I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our mid-quarter deadline tomorrow.
Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important?
Pat Toomey's retirement means we're running for an open seat — and since it's the seat most likely to flip from red to blue next year, it's the most important Senate race in the country.
It's going to be a fierce competition. That's why our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs to try and get an advantage.
**But I refuse to do that. I'm running to represent working folks, not CEOs and big money.**
So my campaign is powered by grassroots donations — real people who believe in our movement, chipping in a few bucks at a time.
That's why I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution today. We set a must-hit goal of 1,000 donations during our mid-quarter fundraising drive, and we need your support to get the job done.
[If you're able, will you pitch in that $3 as part of our 72-hour fundraising drive? Your donation makes a powerful statement that people-power is greater than big money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34000607/300605070/-353695395?refcode2=5cbf7cec-51fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210813-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2JmN2NlYy01MWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6nYmjXDOzj1AJFTspHaJZ_uADLuY3-j143fgTTZPnQ=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34000608/300605071/-353695395?refcode2=5cbf7cec-51fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210813-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2JmN2NlYy01MWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6nYmjXDOzj1AJFTspHaJZ_uADLuY3-j143fgTTZPnQ=)**
Thanks in advance for your donation.
All my best,
Malcolm

* * *

clean_body: I'm running to represent working folks, not CEOs and big money. Friend, I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our mid-quarter deadline tomorrow. Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important? Pat Toomey's retirement means we're running for an open seat — and since it's the seat most likely to flip from red to blue next year, it's the most important Senate race in the country. It's going to be a fierce competition. That's why our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs to try and get an advantage. But I refuse to do that. I'm running to represent working folks, not CEOs and big money. So my campaign is powered by grassroots donations — real people who believe in our movement, chipping in a few bucks at a time. That's why I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution today. We set a must-hit goal of 1,000 donations during our mid-quarter fundraising drive, and we need your support to get the job done. = = Thanks in advance for your donation. All my best, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Your Vaccine Mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter --
Just a short time ago, Democrats kicked me
off my committees and even tried to expel me from Congress (three
times)!
And when I refused to wear a mask in the
Halls of Congress Nancy Pelosi threatened me with thousands of
dollars in legal fines.
She even sent me a warning letter with a list
of demands!
I refused to cave and that letter went
straight through the paper shredder.
Now, I'm pushing back even harder by suing
Pelosi!

HELP MTG SUE PELOSI - EMERGENCY DONATE
$10 NOW
Unless you stand up right now, the Democrats,
the Fake News Media and the Silicon Valley Cartel will go even
further and try and clamp down on American Patriots.
Trump supporters will be purged from social
media. . .
Mask and vaccine mandates and nationwide
lockdowns will be forced on you and I. . .
And Democrats will have used the China Virus
to take over our federal elections.
But you can help me slam the brakes on their
socialist agenda.
Rush your emergency donation of $10 to
help me SUE PELOSI right away!

The Democrats led by Nancy Pelosi, AOC and
the Jihad Squad have painted big red bullseyes on the backs of
American Patriots.
Why?
Because we want to Impeach Biden and Fire
Fauci. . .
Because we oppose the Democrat takeover of
our elections. . .
And because we want to END the nationwide
lockdowns and mask mandates.
If you agree, will you please rush an
emergency donation of $10 right away to help me SUE PELOSI?
I'll keep you updated.
Marjorie Taylor Greene

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

Our clean water crisis is being ignored.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34001754/300609027/1571363332?refcode=em_fr_210813water_n_tn_90do_5_g_testc_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDNmMGJlNi01NWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIHX3-kCJ2UinIy6sKwSv5vUhOdMdyMoUrpr4v9YhFs=) Friend, **Clean water is a right, and in one of the wealthiest countries in the world, it should be easily accessible to all.** From lead-contaminated pipes to toxic, polluted aquifers, over 45 million Americans are consistently without clean water. The Senate's $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill only invests $15 billion into removing lead pipes across the nation, a mere fourth of the $60 billion needed to rid our communities of toxic pipes. clean_body: Our clean water crisis is being ignored. | | = Friend, Clean water is a right, and in one of the wealthiest countries in the world, it should be easily accessible to all. From lead-contaminated pipes to toxic, polluted aquifers, over 45 million Americans are consistently without clean water. The Senate's $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill only invests $15 billion into removing lead pipes across the nation, a mere fourth of the $60 billion needed to rid our communities of toxic pipes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Millions of Americans live without access to clean water, leaving entire communities in a constant state of emergency. It’s time our government invested in the health and wellbeing of its people and the environment around them. Thank you for the support, Team NextGen | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- August**** 13, 2021-** **\- Todd Young Picking Partisanship Over Future of Hoosier Families -** Remember not too long ago when U.S. Senator Todd young described the bipartisan infrastructure bill as a "historic investment" for Indiana? Young's "YES" vote for elements of the American Jobs Plan flipped to a "NO" in the blink of an eye this week. This sudden flip-flop had nothing to do with policies Young once touted with Hoosiers and has everything to do with the extreme partisanship of the Indiana Republican Party. Todd Young's sudden reversal is more about fending off a primary challenger and impressing Donald Trump than delivering solutions for Hoosiers. What's worse, Young is deploying an excuse that's hypocritical from the start. Young's cop-out claims the cost of infrastructure deal was the reason behind his "NO" vote, but if that were true, the Senator would have voted "NO" on the $2.3 trillion tax cut for big corporations and America's richest he supported in 2017. Young would have also spoken up when Donald Trump added more than $7.8 trillion to the national debt in just four years. Unfortunately, Senator Young did neither of these. Hoosier Democrats are tired of these types of partisan games that do nothing to help solve today's most pressing issues facing Hoosier families. Democrats are ready to deliver for Hoosiers, and that includes dismantling the Indiana Republicans' "work more for less" economy, building stronger roads and bridges, and providing further investments for broadband internet access across Indiana. It's time to create a better future for Hoosier families, and Democrats are ready to deliver for all communities across the state. **\- Voters, Democrats Called Out INGOP for "Gerrymandering Tour" -** Indiana Democrats went on offense yet again by joining Hoosiers in every Congressional district to hold the INGOP accountable for trying to rig the redistricting process against Indiana families for another decade. Republicans held their so-called "Redistricting Tour" last week - and it was clear early on the "tour" was nothing more than a box to check and a PR stunt for political use. Republicans' refusal to answer voters' questions made it clear that the hearings were more of an obligation than anything else. Democrats know why. Indiana Republicans are in with the GOP tradition of drawing unfair lines behind closed doors. It's why they hired a Washington D.C. Republican consultant to do their job. It's also why Republicans refuse to hold additional hearings across the state once the maps are released to the public. The system has already been games against a free and fair election process, and the Republicans will do anything possible to hold onto their political power -- with everyday Hoosiers lost in the mix. Indiana Democrats will continue to fight for Hoosier voters all over the state to give them what they deserve - a balanced redistricting process and free and fair elections. Democrats understand the consequences that come with gerrymandering, because in just ten years, Indiana Republicans created a "work more for less" economy, defunded Indiana public schools, and waded into unnecessary culture wars. This very fact is why Democrats will continue to call out Indiana Republicans for trying to rig the system against Hoosiers. We cannot allow extreme, one-sided partisanship to prevent Indiana from a brighter future. **\- Opportunities -** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34002089/300610096/-1140133020?FFF.08.13.21=FFF.08.13.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTg4Mzg0OS01N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lywwouyZ385G8g01YcU-UxbSFp7NCgdwI8ax7K6MqXA=&emci=1d56208a-74fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=21883849-57fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535)**[**Click here to sign up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34002090/300610124/-1140133020?FFF.08.13.21=FFF.08.13.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTg4Mzg0OS01N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lywwouyZ385G8g01YcU-UxbSFp7NCgdwI8ax7K6MqXA=&emci=1d56208a-74fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=21883849-57fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) _**-Save the date-**_ **Wells County Democratic Party:** [Monthly Meeting](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34002091/300610125/-2085123233?FFF.08.13.21=FFF.08.13.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTg4Mzg0OS01N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lywwouyZ385G8g01YcU-UxbSFp7NCgdwI8ax7K6MqXA=&emci=1d56208a-74fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=21883849-57fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535), August 14, 8:30 - clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- August 13, 2021- \- Todd Young Picking Partisanship Over Future of Hoosier Families - Remember not too long ago when U.S. Senator Todd young described the bipartisan infrastructure bill as a "historic investment" for Indiana? Young's "YES" vote for elements of the American Jobs Plan flipped to a "NO" in the blink of an eye this week. This sudden flip-flop had nothing to do with policies Young once touted with Hoosiers and has everything to do with the extreme partisanship of the Indiana Republican Party. Todd Young's sudden reversal is more about fending off a primary challenger and impressing Donald Trump than delivering solutions for Hoosiers. What's worse, Young is deploying an excuse that's hypocritical from the start. Young's cop-out claims the cost of infrastructure deal was the reason behind his "NO" vote, but if that were true, the Senator would have voted "NO" on the $2.3 trillion tax cut for big corporations and America's richest he supported in 2017. Young would have also spoken up when Donald Trump added more than $7.8 trillion to the national debt in just four years. Unfortunately, Senator Young did neither of these. Hoosier Democrats are tired of these types of partisan games that do nothing to help solve today's most pressing issues facing Hoosier families. Democrats are ready to deliver for Hoosiers, and that includes dismantling the Indiana Republicans' "work more for less" economy, building stronger roads and bridges, and providing further investments for broadband internet access across Indiana. It's time to create a better future for Hoosier families, and Democrats are ready to deliver for all communities across the state. \- Voters, Democrats Called Out INGOP for "Gerrymandering Tour" - Indiana Democrats went on offense yet again by joining Hoosiers in every Congressional district to hold the INGOP accountable for trying to rig the redistricting process against Indiana families for another decade. Republicans held their so-called "Redistricting Tour" last week - and it was clear early on the "tour" was nothing more than a box to check and a PR stunt for political use. Republicans' refusal to answer voters' questions made it clear that the hearings were more of an obligation than anything else. Democrats know why. Indiana Republicans are in with the GOP tradition of drawing unfair lines behind closed doors. It's why they hired a Washington D.C. Republican consultant to do their job. It's also why Republicans refuse to hold additional hearings across the state once the maps are released to the public. The system has already been games against a free and fair election process, and the Republicans will do anything possible to hold onto their political power -- with everyday Hoosiers lost in the mix. Indiana Democrats will continue to fight for Hoosier voters all over the state to give them what they deserve - a balanced redistricting process and free and fair elections. Democrats understand the consequences that come with gerrymandering, because in just ten years, Indiana Republicans created a "work more for less" economy, defunded Indiana public schools, and waded into unnecessary culture wars. This very fact is why Democrats will continue to call out Indiana Republicans for trying to rig the system against Hoosiers. We cannot allow extreme, one-sided partisanship to prevent Indiana from a brighter future. \- Opportunities - -Save the date- Wells County Democratic Party: , August 14, 8:30 - 10:00 AM, Wells County Democratic Party Headquarters, 119 S Johnson St, Bluffton, IN 46714 Bartholomew County Democratic Party: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.08.13.21=FFF.08.13.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTg4Mzg0OS01N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lywwouyZ385G8g01YcU-UxbSFp7NCgdwI8ax7K6MqXA=&emci=1d56208a-74fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=21883849-57fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535, August 14, 9:00 - | | Here’s where we stand, Derek.

We need to reach $500,000 by midnight on Sunday to be on pace for our million dollar August goal.

And as of this morning, **we’re still about $110,000 away from that benchmark.**

[**So I’ll get right to the point, because we have a lot to do and not very much time. Will you chip in $20 or $30 today to help us reach this critical benchmark?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34003024/300613515/-2023814932?refcode=20210813.5_EW_8BB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOTZmYy01N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ArdrXDznQ_ksMA0LNrqin7qBbes41z1TNn4-CjpdmOY=)

The thing is, if we’re already falling behind at this point in the month, _there’s no way we’ll be able to reach our August goal of raising $1 million online._

I know it’s an ambitious goal, Derek, and I know we’ve been sending a lot of emails, but we’re up against a major GOP war chest and we’ve got to be able to fight back.

[**_We won’t be successful unless every single person steps up and does their part. name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Let’s PRIMARY Adam Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128498:J0K2D4leN:m:1:3253819041:83254D7EF6F9F87202E73152D19A8246:r) | |
---
Peter,

My name is Catalina Lauf, and I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have an R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Politicians like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue._**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

_He 's gone all in with the fake news. Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128498:J0K2D4leN:m:1:3253819041:83254D7EF6F9F87202E73152D19A8246:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are all doing dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128498:J0K2D4leN:m:1:3253819041:83254D7EF6F9F87202E73152D19A8246:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

_That 's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it. _

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. He's working for them, after all.

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed cabal of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.
[**> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128498:J0K2D4leN:m:1:3253819041:83254D7EF6F9F87202E73152D19A8246:r)
Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.
[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128498:J0K2D4leN:m:1:3253819041:83254D7EF6F9F87202E73152D19A8246:r)
Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128498:J0K2D4leN:m:1:3253819041:83254D7EF6F9F87202E73152D19A8246:r)

Catalina Lauf

body:
The left has lost their minds when it comes to our freedoms.
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bd15ed606341a6e/9994d6adc87e77d5c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, This just came across my desk, and it’s truly alarming. **Congressman Ritchie Torres, a Democrat from New York, introduced legislation that would mandate the vaccine for ANYONE travelling to or from an American airport**.

First mask mandates, and now vaccine mandates? Where does it stop? [**RUSH A DONATION TO STOP MASK MANDATES >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bd15ed606341a6e/19d72ab60c7d0811c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Already, Democrat-controlled counties across North Carolina are instituting these oppressive mask mandates. Mecklenburg County, Wake County, Guilford County, and Buncombe County have all instituted their own version of requiring their citizens to wear their masks in public, vaccinated or not! There’s no telling what’s next. With their grip tightening on the Senate and House, Pelosi and Schumer are consolidating their powers over Americans at an unprecedented rate.

They've taken control of our federal government, and they’re steering us in a dystopian direction that resembles George Orwell’s 1984 more than the United States of America. Peter, I need dedicated patriots like YOU to help me fight back against these power grabs. **Please chip in your best gift now to help us head into the fall STRONG, and keep fighting against the anti-American radical left!** [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bd15ed606341a6e/72d6c9e38b8eb1e1c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $10 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bd15ed606341a6e/ce602f6d74b9d5efc3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bd15ed606341a6e/60f58cae878a2228c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bd15ed606341a6e/0c99ed2196b7b547c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $100 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bd15ed606341a6e/d1f6110946863203c3d6b838967d376c/35903) We’re working on building our war chest NOW, because we’ve got an uphill battle coming up in both the primary and general election. **[If you want a Conservative Senator with a backbone representing the Tar Heel State, and who will fight for what’s right, please rush your donation now to make a difference](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bd15ed606341a6e/1c41aec365128c01c3d6b838967d376c/35903)**. body:
We’ve only got two more days to meet this fundraising goal before the mid-month deadline.
#
Peter,
Senate Democrats have been hard at work -- from rebuilding our physical infrastructure to supporting working families with affordable child care, paid leave, and more -- but all of our progress is at risk if we let Mitch McConnell and the Republicans take back the majority.
Corporate interests and the Republican establishment will stop at nothing to flip the Senate -- because they don’t want our government to work for the people, besides those at the very top.
**But we’re going to show them the power of the people and defend the Senate in 2022. That’s why I just set a $14,250 mid-month fundraising goal to keep this fight on track.**
**[Can I count on you in this fight, Peter? Pitch in $5 or anything you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34003560/300615769/1018173269?refcode=pm_em_210813_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODM3ZGVjZi01OWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OKjvcQpay3T13XdhHBCKMu0zgFY9_F1Ykay--7tIcU=)**
We’ve only got two more days to meet this fundraising goal before the mid-month deadline.
It may seem like there’s still time to build the movement we’ll need to win next November, but this is a make-or-break moment because of what we’re up against._Democrats are making progress_ \-- _but Republicans are ready and waiting to roll it all back if they get the opportunity._
**[This is one thing you can do today to keep the Senate blue: contribute $5 right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34003561/300615770/1018173269?refcode=pm_em_210813_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODM3ZGVjZi01OWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OKjvcQpay3T13XdhHBCKMu0zgFY9_F1Ykay--7tIcU=)**

Patty
