It may seem like there’s still time to build the movement we’ll need to win next November, but this is a make-or-break moment because of what we’re up against.Democrats are making progress \-- but Republicans are ready and waiting to roll it all back if they get the opportunity. = Thank you, Patty = As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

If you want to defeat the Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Democrat agenda to destroy our country, I urge you to . . .
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/S8uO6kMjO99nqwk1Kyu5jQ/Zi61xpJp892z0qfKGgz0zmlw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Clay for Virginia.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/S8uO6kMjO99nqwk1Kyu5jQ/Zi61xpJp892z0qfKGgz0zmlw)**.

Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/S8uO6kMjO99nqwk1Kyu5jQ/Zi61xpJp892z0qfKGgz0zmlw) [**If you want to defeat the Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Democrat agenda to destroy our country, I urge you to give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more right now to my campaign for Congress.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/S8uO6kMjO99nqwk1Kyu5jQ/Zi61xpJp892z0qfKGgz0zmlw)

What’s so urgent, you ask?

Well, the Democrat Congressional Campaign Committee just polled likely voters for the 2022 election in “more than four dozen congressional battleground districts and regions,” according to Politico. And stunned Democrats are reeling from the results:

**“If the midterms were held now, they would lose the majority.”**

DCCC head Rep. Sean Patrick Maloney said that to Democrat Congressmen from those battleground districts in a closed-door meeting. Patriot, there’s more:

“... a growing number of battleground-district incumbents are privately alarmed by new data that showed the party struggling on bellwether issues such as the economy...And they worry that Maloney’s stark warning, once made public, could significantly impact fundraising and recruitment.” **And those Democrats are desperately trying to keep their colleagues from saying another word about “police funding or critical race theory.”**

You see, they know Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and their yes men in Congress have gone too far with their unhinged attacks on:
* Police and community safety
* Unity with our neighbors (by trying to pit us against each other because of skin color)
* Our Constitutionally protected rights, and the rule of law

And with your help, I can do something about it!

Patriot, I’m Clay Percle. I’m a husband, a father of four great kids, and a retired Air Force fighter pilot with multiple combat tours under my belt.

And I’m running for Congress in Virginia’s 10th District because I can’t sit on the sidelines while politicians tear America apart.

I don’t want to run for Congress...I have to!

I’m working with patriotic professionals who know how to run for office and win.

First I have to win the Republican nomination...then I can beat on the liberal Democrat who knows her seat is at risk.

But I can’t get to Capitol Hill without your urgently needed help.

[**Patriot, please help me fully fund my vital voter outreach programs with your best gift of a critical $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/S8uO6kMjO99nqwk1Kyu5jQ/Zi61xpJp892z0qfKGgz0zmlw)

[**Please give $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can afford right away.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/S8uO6kMjO99nqwk1Kyu5jQ/Zi61xpJp892z0qfKGgz0zmlw)

You deserve a fellow patriot working for you in 2022.

Sincerely,

Clay Percle
Lt Col (Ret) USAF
Candidate for Congress
Virginia’s 10th Congressional District

clean_body: Republican Patriots stick together. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Hey, Peter -- It’s me: Madison Cawthorn. I’ll get right to the point. Right now, the Democrats are racing to “Change America” into a Socialist Nation. Government regulation, suspension of property rights, gun control, forever mask mandates, rising inflation, and insecure elections. This is the Democrats’ agenda. But there’s good news! We’re just FIVE SEATS away from winning back the House Majority, and one of our best “pickup opportunities” is right here in my home state of North Carolina. And I believe that if we work together, we can Fire Nancy Pelosi and Take Back The House. | | | | | | I refuse to sit by and watch while Nancy Pelosi and the Socialist Squad destroys the nation I love to much. Instead, I’m going to STAND AND FIGHT for America -- and I hope you’ll join me. I’m counting on you, Peter. Congressman Madison Cawthorn Sent via North Carolina Republican Party |

name: Representative Kyle Hoffman
subject: Help me SAVE Kansas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
In case we haven’t met yet, my name is Kyle Hoffman and I serve as a state representative for Comanche County, Barber County, Harper County & the NW c Friend, In case we haven’t met yet, my name is Kyle Hoffman and I serve as a state representative for Comanche County, Barber County, Harper County & the NW corner Sumner County. I also serve as the Chairman of the Joint Committee on Information Technology and Vice Chair of the House Appropriations Committee. As a farmer and rancher myself, I’m committed to bringing the values of rural Kansans to Topeka. **The best way to do that, right now, is to support Derek Schmidt for governor.** As conservatives, we have a job to do. We have a responsibility to grasp any chance we have of turning our state around and solidifying our conservative values in place for years to come.
Our best chance at creating a future that is pro-family, pro-ag, and pro-America is Derek Schmidt. [**I hope you’ll join me in showing your support by chipping in anything you clean_body: In case we haven’t met yet, my name is Kyle Hoffman and I serve as a state representative for Comanche County, Barber County, Harper County & the NW c Friend, In case we haven’t met yet, my name is Kyle Hoffman and I serve as a state representative for Comanche County, Barber County, Harper County & the NW corner Sumner County. I also serve as the Chairman of the Joint Committee on Information Technology and Vice Chair of the House Appropriations Committee. As a farmer and rancher myself, I’m committed to bringing the values of rural Kansans to Topeka. The best way to do that, right now, is to support Derek Schmidt for governor. As conservatives, we have a job to do. We have a responsibility to grasp any chance we have of turning our state around and solidifying our conservative values in place for years to come. Our best chance at creating a future that is pro-family, pro-ag, and pro-America is Derek Schmidt. Over the last several years, I’ve gotten to know Derek personally and professionally. He’s willing to listen and thoughtfully consider the issues. He understands rural Kansas. I’m proud to support Derek as our next Kansas Governor. –Representative Kyle Hoffman Chairman, Joint Committee on Information Technology Kansas State Representative, 116th District | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: Vaccine mandate time?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=77792774af12421780d2feb4730bd6be&_t=SKhrD4slV1pskwfAQHhi-_eH8MaQf3EX1zUmfbbMnL_dkl8Dpsa2t8Fqp-1selXx_rgE6aduVL3GKqreBmlehDE5JA-1lIkOqy2r7tBtpTGInhC6qDoruBV0oVmSsOETO-RtbSp0-QbtZgfj-hK1KJRHG_Gde275Txlb-ckR7T4%3D)

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77792774af12421780d2feb4730bd6be&_e=ho49xoWdfP1c1roIm9JONIm5dUQjOmgvx7iiInfqTW6vhaqv2pdmteGp3CfW5-_zAvlkMWsDIjiH2sIu4pmmmPcL5L4JPgWDdk4MJC0-eyBkboJRVC19aUvZNyp0bFmI_QqtzrLhKs5eKemZOpqUYatxM6yR1CjJqie8UYV8oWQQcJ4m4Ak77tepOC18T1SHMjwAfhotTUzmIPpx1mmAx0s-gufKLgC02_vaypA5L0oLpvPENjhPiWKg75-GyjeZrEWukxwKLaxToL_okPB3ExqRh0Kc4rcVuXuZK1z0I-Ptvfpd7omh3gDOaJIEfLlLIzQhbUAZFMgd50QRPgySbizj7FZfpcbNOJ5EKTrD4BWqxslJ6ct7a7Z--OP4ZJKbIwKMHgmu80vSVKK0BpZSrxEJZdJ0NmrVzIcbEzEXaUg1TNgQ0YIasIlbfSlJqEeaJp6GEsO-Q7Swn_33msheU6WA84K0TEpuQOMkrcxSBV4H41VfU2x6RacMAzf4WMGl)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77792774af12421780d2feb4730bd6be&_e=ho49xoWdfP1c1roIm9JONIm5dUQjOmgvx7iiInfqTW6vhaqv2pdmteGp3CfW5-_zAvlkMWsDIjiH2sIu4pmmmPcL5L4JPgWDdk4MJC0-eyBkboJRVC19aUvZNyp0bFmI_QqtzrLhKs5eKemZOpqUYatxM6yR1CjJqie8UYV8oWQQcJ4m4Ak77tepOC18T1SHMjwAfhotTUzmIPpx1mmAx0s-gufKLgC02_vaypA5L0oLpvPENjhPiWKg75-GyjeZrEWukxwKLaxToL_okPB3ExqRh0Kc4rcVuXuZK1z0I-N0HiHQOLBR2V-mDmSmJrkYcOMW_qf-Lnv3mHAcGKTmzhpN8FOoBPxDSEIwaxKynaOUOTKS1bFWMIUdxsxypqHHLa2AGhYmQRHCvIYcY0Qpxsh5FOeTSgSN648EtXg_R6djzSv1b0O2jjPxe9bEpEjX0_5gznya4hPSlLJPVLZLxGshcA1Fp29Wac_FlIQLTP4k_ioFhBnkTSP2T4m93mA2)** _

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77792774af12421780d2feb4730bd6be&_e=ho49xoWdfP1c1roIm9JONIm5dUQjOmgvx7iiInfqTW6vhaqv2pdmteGp3CfW5-_zAvlkMWsDIjiH2sIu4pmmmPcL5L4JPgWDdk4MJC0-eyBkboJRVC19aUvZNyp0bFmI_QqtzrLhKs5eKemZOpqUYatxM6yR1CjJqie8UYV8oWQQcJ4m4Ak77tepOC18T1SHMjwAfhotTUzmIPpx1mmAx0s-gufKLgC02_vaypA5L0oLpvPENjhPiWKg75-GyjeZrEWukxwKLaxToL_okPB3ExqRh0Kc4rcVuXuZK1z0I-NT1-DOw7WgQVCTCQFm8iDUr_Yht-faeh8Kdx3FVxO7CF9uDF0_aiyOc0DBw3atNZtG--hGTsxs0rqLjbVq1j4CYpsofFM3hjdzgXbByUsIee_6BPjt9_zKfBFeX_wZ5AdGxcmklcrlRh9NoDW0OTqTls2DA1WmoDKdA4AsrL7NTOKFaKrBHAbLaI_VaA4DRfj91zHC7ckzUOyXU2qLXHOV)**

Thank you,

Friend, I'll get right to it: **Donald Trump recently visited Arizona to spread lies about the 2020 election, defend the GOP's sham election audit and keep this battleground state red. If we don't fight back now, I'm worried our entire movement to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue could be in serious danger. **

That's why we set an ambitious mid-month fundraising goal – so that we have the resources we need to fight back against Trump's lies, defend our state and finally elect a Democratic governor. But unless we see a surge in grassroots support, I'm afraid we'll fall short: [So please, friend, will you give $5 or more now – any amount helps – to flip battleground Arizona blue and defeat Trumpism once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34006756/300626573/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk176-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjVhYjM3MS02MmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S0zahZ48Bo7l2SKWTP7X7qiGK4K7L4xS31-lo-A7B00=)
Arizona Democrats – led by Latinx and Native American voters – fought hard to turn Arizona blue for the first time in decades and deliver big for Democrats. But the GOP couldn't handle it. They immediately lashed out – passing voter suppression laws and inviting the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene and Donald Trump to come to Arizona and attack our democracy. That's exactly what their sham "audit" is: an attack on your voice and on the core of the democratic process.
As an Arizonan, I was horrified to watch my state's governor not just accept this but welcome it. It's clear that state GOP "leaders" like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward aren't focused on what actual Arizonans need. That's why I'm running to be our _next_ governor and finally get us back on track – to defend voting rights, fix our broken education system and build a state that works for all people.

**But these recent attacks on democracy (and decency) have made it clear that we will NOT win this fight unless we hit every goal, every deadline, every time. And we have to do that, because t****he only way to stop Trumpism from running rampant across Arizona is by kicking his supporters out of power and electing a Democratic governor.**
Here's the good news: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that we can win – but insiders at POLITICO say Republicans are getting ready to spend BIG to defeat me and keep this battleground red. **That's why this mid-month goal is so critical – but we're already falling behind, and I need your help now to close our budget gap.**
[**What we do for our democracy RIGHT NOW will be felt for GENERATIONS – and we cannot afford to let Trump define our future. So please, will you donate $5 or more now – before our critical mid-month fundraising deadline – to defeat GOP extremists and ****flip Arizona blue****?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34006757/300626574/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk176-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjVhYjM3MS02MmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S0zahZ48Bo7l2SKWTP7X7qiGK4K7L4xS31-lo-A7B00=)

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=7e1ce2a8cafc400ba26f3dbbc0268f62&_e=wCWUacQ9jBCRzcta3CmSUbVs9yjCSL0Yt_atg9wAlm6EnA5GVtno__tApaNlE4OwE_WgRv93Kp7F5wGcE4VHPxjRW7ZGhxB58A1lyd-42nzdZEu9zncgHXQ7Ah8vxcfQRDpqHTB3xLDCJgeXQYN46-PaSYNc8wNSRspjjaOUu6FWPzsk1Gr-o19AkYqhbv513ZumUFmuxGfsOFwzQBnZ-X97aZbcQ70yQ4rN6Ehq8Q_poK1zMmwIYHsza4yXbNjsqzvzMkm0O0tFMTRoGOCmSf6yIdDqE87uj1s_ikVzNDdrXh3gfxPpVtKGDmoP9ZB7mW3Xof0kEvpMMeKqnwUzGIyYVg7wDz16vf3BK4-nqTiOEhOOSzxtgv7YwIAxb4m8FqiTJVWGKt7s-zyoahiklr2SJ5sOUxMnai8dNyM74I37yHwjncV9RvVPAsS76DAP_KMt0cKrlXAT1wkSV03N_FJXkoaYOPEE3xIL_a3Z4OW1g01FkimvonnN5Ut8cdoc)**

name: Team Bass
subject: The RNC chairwoman is right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

We don't normally fill you in on GOP talking points, but Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel just confirmed what we've known for months: **Trump "still leads the [Republican] party."**

The worst part? **She 's right.** Hundreds of thousands of supporters are still showing up at Trump's rallies, and House Republicans outraised House Democrats by nearly _ten million dollars_ last quarter.

Trump's allies in the House are remaining loyal to him no matter the cost -- even in the middle of a climate crisis and a global pandemic. We need to expand our Democratic majorities in 2022 to end Trump's grip on our politics, but we can't do it alone.

**[We set a goal to raise $4,500 before the mid-month deadline on Sunday at midnight. Will you chip in to Karen's campaign before then?](https://act.myngp.com/el/sG6V_n5TydOMJLeTw9uvdnlXRG-ILsE9L_sQA6mHfig=/hkyPHFO_jSRMxYx6rA8WzF5awYSRhoOL1-UR-vovdJE=?gpsid=39_132_20132&refcode=em21_210813_mm1_fnd_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210813_mm1_fnd_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Karen refuses to be intimidated by McDaniel or any of Trump's other puppets because this grassroots movement has always had her back.

We defended the House majority from a GOP takeover in 2020._We can do it again in 2022._ But we have to raise the necessary funds now, which means hitting every single goal we set.

name: Mark Warner
subject: We’re putting Americans to work and rebuilding our infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This week, the Senate came together across party lines and advanced the bipartisan infrastructure package that I have helped negotiate over the past few months -- let me tell you about it.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34008071/300630284/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjhiYzllNi02NmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AEH7rzGyTbj4q6Fzizrk-9tf_HDFTY8ua-7NZJdWvC8=&emci=5787666e-5afc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2b8bc9e6-66fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, This week, the Senate came together across party lines and advanced the bipartisan infrastructure package that I have helped negotiate over the past few months.This legislation will not only make crucial investments in our nation’s recovery from this crisis, it will help put Virginians and Americans back to work rebuilding our infrastructure. Some of the key wins for Virginians in this package include funding for:
* Repairing and rebuilding our roads, highways, and bridges
* Improving public transit systems, including the Metro system in Northern Virginia
* Upgrading passenger rail to increase travel options and reliability
* Supporting our airports, ports, and waterways
* Expanding broadband internet access across the Commonwealth
* Investing in our future by making our communities resilient to climate change

I’m looking forward to the day when President Biden officially signs this package into law. We still have a lot of work ahead of us in the Senate, but I wanted to share this good news with you. Together, we’re proving that our government can still work for people across the country. I’ll keep you posted in the coming days. I just want to say thank you for your continued support. Mark Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34008072/300630285/-402393126?refcode=mw_em_210813_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjhiYzllNi02NmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AEH7rzGyTbj4q6Fzizrk-9tf_HDFTY8ua-7NZJdWvC8=)**

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Cowardly.
body:
Trump is bashing the Capitol Police with veiled threats and McCarthy isn't doing a damn thing to defend them. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34008223/300631000/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRmYzdhNS02N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTrPu6aM5bpod9xcPBYL92e8Fv4bcZFJLHwd3bTpNK8=)
Friend,

This is a serious email about my opponent Kevin McCarthy's failure to hold Trump accountable for the offensive comments he's made about US Capitol Police Officers. Please read it, and then consider **[chipping in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34008224/300631001/-686739743?refcode=em-08132021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRmYzdhNS02N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTrPu6aM5bpod9xcPBYL92e8Fv4bcZFJLHwd3bTpNK8=)** to help me get the word out and defeat him in the midterms.

After far-right insurrectionists attacked the Capitol injuring hundreds of police officers -- five of whom died -- McCarthy initially called for an independent investigation. _Then, he completely flip-flopped,_ shielding Trump from any accountability for his role in stoking violence that day.

Now, Trump is bashing the Capitol Police with veiled threats and McCarthy isn't doing a damn thing to defend them -- despite the fact they saved lives during the attack.

**It's cowardly, hypocritical, and it's yet another reminder that McCarthy isn't fit to serve this district, let alone Speaker of the House. He'd rather kowtow to Trump and the fringe far-right than do the right thing.**

If I weren't so frustrated by his actions, I would be embarrassed for him -- but I'm fed up and I'm ready to replace him.

I'm confident we can win this race, improve the lives of everyone in the Central Valley by focusing on real issues -- not beltway politics. In order to do that, I need your help:

**[If you're fired up after reading this, contribute today to give us a jump on our end-of-week fundraising goal. We're still $7,197 short of where we need to be by midnight tonight. Any amount helps, but $3 from you will go a long way in getting the word out about Kevin's actions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34008225/300631002/-686739743?refcode=em-08132021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRmYzdhNS02N2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTrPu6aM5bpod9xcPBYL92e8Fv4bcZFJLHwd3bTpNK8=)**

clean_body: Trump is bashing the Capitol Police with veiled threats and McCarthy isn't doing a damn thing to defend them. | = Friend, This is a serious email about my opponent Kevin McCarthy's failure to hold Trump accountable for the offensive comments he's made about US Capitol Police Officers. Please read it, and then consider = to help me get the word out and defeat him in the midterms. After far-right insurrectionists attacked the Capitol injuring hundreds of police officers -- five of whom died -- McCarthy initially called for an independent investigation. Then, he completely flip-flopped, shielding Trump from any accountability for his role in stoking violence that day. Now, Trump is bashing the Capitol Police with veiled threats and McCarthy isn't doing a damn thing to defend them -- despite the fact they saved lives during the attack. It's cowardly, hypocritical, and it's yet another reminder that McCarthy isn't fit to serve this district, let alone Speaker of the House. He'd rather kowtow to Trump and the fringe far-right than do the right thing. If I weren't so frustrated by his actions, I would be embarrassed for him -- but I'm fed up and I'm ready to replace him. I'm confident we can win this race, improve the lives of everyone in the Central Valley by focusing on real issues -- not beltway politics. In order to do that, I need your help: = Thanks in advance, Marisa | = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. Peter,

Do you know why I dedicate everything to this campaign?

Folks in our communities deserve better: **It's that simple.** Our children need funding for their education, and families need to know that we will protect them through the pandemic. We need good-paying jobs with benefits, and it's long past time for our nation to affirm that _women are not second-class citizens._

Our current representative would like you to believe that these issues are not important, but we are stronger because of our diversity. **There is more that unites us than divides us, and our democracy only survives and thrives when we fight for change on every level.**

Here in CA-25, we deserve a representative who believes in making a difference, somebody who is ready to stand and be a voice for our district, a leader who relies on compassion and is focused on leveling the playing field.

This is why I am running for Congress.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Potential criminal charges for Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AnzTmVx4sid6OFMOlaPWxOuKkH0Xkzl7&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
There has been a major new development.
I recently heard closed-door testimony from Jeff Rosen, the acting attorney general during Donald Trump's final weeks in office.
The details that Rosen revealed to the Senate Judiciary Committee about Trump's attempts to use the power of the presidency to overturn the 2020 election were simply chilling.
What's clearer than ever: In his frenzied final weeks in office, Trump brought our country - our system of free and fair elections, the very foundation of our democracy - dangerously close to total catastrophe. Only the character and resilience of a handful of individuals saved us from going over the precipice as a nation.
**Donald Trump mounted a pressure campaign that was absolutely relentless, brutal, and directly aimed at the Department of Justice - seeking to weaponize it for his own political benefit - with intent to overthrow the election.**
**And as a former U.S. Attorney and a state attorney general for 20 years, I know there is a real potential for criminal charges. The facts must be gathered and all options should be seriously considered.**
Our committee intends to hear from more key witnesses in the coming weeks to reveal the full extent of Trump's wrongdoing. **But as right-wing attempts to derail our committee and cover up Trump 's crimes ramp up, I need to know you're with me in our fight to get the facts and hold Trump accountable. Please, click the link to let me know where you stand now:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump's attempts to abuse the power of his office and overturn the 2020 election?](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1062-su-nd)**
These latest revelations demonstrate that we must continue investigating the former president and his acolytes -- holding them accountable for the grave damages he attempted to inflict on our democratic institutions. It's incumbent upon all of us to speak out. I appreciate you raising your voice alongside mine.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1062-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7YYAIWdN28At0HR9RNR44PolCfypMXwS&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

| | |

Dear friend, There has never been a more crucial election in our Commonwealth. As I traveled around the Commonwealth this week, speaking with citizens of all faiths, colors, backgrounds, and creeds, I heard many of the same concerns. **Virginians have lost faith in Richmond’s ability to solve problems and they are ready for a new kind of leader, one who brings people together around our shared values to solve problems and get things done.** They are tired of career politicians putting their own political interests ahead of the lives, safety, and fortunes of our citizens. The people of Virginia deserve better.
---

clean_body: There has never been a more crucial election in our Commonwealth. As I traveled around the Commonwealth this week speaking with citizens of | | | | ---|---|--- Dear friend, There has never been a more crucial election in our Commonwealth. As I traveled around the Commonwealth this week, speaking with citizens of all faiths, colors, backgrounds, and creeds, I heard many of the same concerns. Virginians have lost faith in Richmond’s ability to solve problems and they are ready for a new kind of leader, one who brings people together around our shared values to solve problems and get things done. They are tired of career politicians putting their own political interests ahead of the lives, safety, and fortunes of our citizens. The people of Virginia deserve better. | | | ---|---|--- Since 2014, taxes on gas have increased 136%, siphoning hundreds of dollars from taxpayers’ pockets. Terry McAuliffe had his chance as governor and used it to nickel-and-dime Virginians. It’s time we elect a governor who will allow Virginians to keep more of their hard-earned income. On Thursday, I visited a local gas station to hear first hand how 8 years of Democratic leadership in Richmond has harmed the citizens of our Commonwealth. | | | ---|---|--- All across the Commonwealth, violent crime is on the rise. The murder rate is at a 20-year high, and Virginians feel less safe. As governor, I'll stand up for law enforcement, make sure they have the funding they need, and work to make Virginia the safest state in America. | | | ---|---|--- I feel so blessed by the groundswell of support I am seeing across the Commonwealth. Team Youngkin has been hard at work all across Virginia recruiting volunteers and winning over of voters. I hope you will join us. It’s clear Virginians are ready to win in November! | There’s much work ahead – and I’m grateful to have you on this journey with us. Don’t forget to follow us on , , , and so you stay up to date with all things Team Youngkin. I hope to see you on the trail soon. For Virginia, Glenn Youngkin Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

| the wheels on the bus...🚌
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1lPTPZXvvtbgdS9MLHj35CQPx06U44i8791VB2Saico)
## **🚌 IT’S BACK TO SCHOOL SEASON! 📚**
As kids buy new lunchboxes and obsess over shiny pencil cases, it’s time for you to get back to class too!

NDTC has the live trainings, courses, and resources that every Democratic campaign and operative needs.

Now more than ever we need dedicated local leaders, from city council to school board, and NDTC is here to help!

* * *

[**How Your Local Democratic Party Can Prepare for GOTV**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ATnSne1QO7dB6dcuGoarKBU_75WECRIhTN43fGGig6k)
**TODAY, 1pm ET

** GOTV is the most crucial time for campaigns!

Join us TODAY and learn how your local Democratic party can help mobilize volunteers and supporters alike!
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZYAUwOnMZJhcJtABgmbZsLldNDDKKud35W27H94JeiI)
---

* * *

[**How to Put Your GOTV Plan Into Action**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..gVkh7a-oJemIzLK2KNZq5u8kztuYxd_ITY_-e-k0PRo)
**Monday, August 16, 8pm ET

** You’ve spent all this time planning and strategizing — it’s time to put those plans into action and get out the vote!

Join us on Monday to learn how to mobilize voters and get your supporters to the polls.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..sZlm8SreC7u5FcKAEZx4O7C-AXkLdQeqeb1s4Kks_lE)
---

* * *

[**What is a Democratic Precinct Chair?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bq0s1LjYhniYtUR5e91uTdRwpqynHaEfxci74FHJ48Q)
**Tuesday, August 17, 1pm ET

** How do you maximize your organizing efforts without knowing what and who Democratic precinct chairs are? It’s simple, _you can’t!

_ Let our trainers teach you all about this critical position in your local party and how you can become a precinct chair yourself!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..W5tRBNIP7h4GJTTRipNR6rTvLXCO-Gp7KcpxzKn9y-A)
---

* * *

[**How to Boost Your GOTV Email Strategy with Effective Calls to Action**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..cEn5878Qpq_jVIwVbXBP1vAu1uf_MqLCFH4Li8kHYik)
**Wednesday, August 18, 1pm ET

** Email can be a powerful tool to get the volunteer numbers you need to win.

This training will teach you how to supercharge your emails with strong calls to action to hit your GOTV goals.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..hI395k-eTlo2NmSsJJG2657f6HTQW9lp43G9Ci0Noe0)
---

* * *

[**Cybersecurity for Campaigns: Understanding and Reducing Your Risk**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FSxY4xTodVdsWB2m8_c94YhWhhEuFt2TlqDNxtyykR4)
**Thursday, August 19, 1pm ET

** Join NDTC Founder and CEO **Kelly Dietrich** as he discusses campaign cybersecurity with experts **Alison Goh** , Security Manager for the [Democratic National Committee](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Bp4EyNgk3K4cgg6KepuBwIX2FbOn6qgtsKPdOXUO2F4) and **Michael Kaiser** , the President and CEO of [Defending Digital Campaigns.](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..oCeALMlTxX-VcSQv-yZUgUHEdMctPKmuzxDWJTc4LD0)

You won’t want to miss this opportunity to learn how to protect your campaign from cyber threats and how to respond when one happens.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..trnMKTbh__dMfOWHi47VZhdbCq0VVXihXmAkfMZoWZ4)
---

* * *

[**NDTC's Candidate Bootcamp**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YLryfOi12lueUw9xIt-Ne4AIP3-isSECf6JVUCmnR44)
**Saturday, August 21, 1pm ET

** _If you are running for office or working on a campaign in any capacity, this is a can’t-miss event!

_ Candidates and campaign staff from across the country are coming together for a day of networking and training in the best practices that launch Democrats to VICTORY!

[REGISTER NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..o7YUbwax8HT3Co5_t6hngiTOc8jkih85NCm85WJC1Zo)
---

* * *

**🚨 Article Spotlight:**[**Build Blue Week: Preparing Democrats to Win the Future**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..hUceByd58hXDUy0N3-BSgwDEqqaYZBWqeEm5MyqHmOA)
In the first-ever event of its kind, NDTC is bringing a diverse group of **Democratic leaders from across the country (including the White House!)** together for seven full days of programming!

During Build Blue Week, candidates, campaign staff, and local leaders will have the opportunity to network with leaders in the Democratic party at **Q &A sessions and special trainings **on topics including voting rights, relational organizing, running campaigns in red states, and so much more!

_Build Blue Week will take place from September 18-24, 2021._[_Read this article now to see the full agenda and find out who some of our special guests are!_](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uoBmtYPb_GEiNo-QTQGRrwmzQTT0UoOf0fNzwoUGPTw)

[READ NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ME2XoXqy06BOSSzpkOyslniq1YchRvBWD0wgGgTvqGc)
---

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Why I’m voting against the “infrastructure” bills
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
%%FirstName%%, I can’t support this in good conscience. Read more
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/92def14c1beb1f5f/fa1a7efd4efe2b4fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, I just wanted to drop you a quick note and let you know why I plan to vote against the so-called “infrastructure” bills. Let me be clear. Our infrastructure has real problems – both in Oklahoma and across the country. Our roads and bridges are in desperate need of repair. Broadband internet (especially in rural areas) needs heavy investment. And I would gladly support a sensible plan to fix these problems.
**But let’s call a spade a spade. This isn’t about infrastructure. I cannot in good conscience support nearly $5 trillion in reckless spending when only a small fraction of the funding actually goes toward making repairs. ** As a member of the Ways and Means Committee, I will do everything in my power to find common sense, conservative solutions to fix our roads and bridges and expand broadband access. But Nancy Pelosi’s phony “infrastructure” plan is a total non-starter for anyone who cares about the fiscal future of our nation. And I’m duty-bound to oppose it. Sincerely, Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/92def14c1beb1f5f/9468a2c5df5caa7dc3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/92def14c1beb1f5f/84b5009f5b05c739c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

I’m so proud working-class Americans -- like you, Peter -- fund our movement by chipping in $18 or whatever they can afford at a time to support this mission.

**In contrast, my opponent Devin Nunes is swimming in corporate dark money -- and his dark money could completely drown our message out if we don’t fight back, Peter!**

Message & data rates may apply. = Peter, I’m beyond humbled: My average donation is $18. = | = As a working-class Californian, I know how hard you work for your money -- and I know how much $18 means, Peter. I’m so proud working-class Americans -- like you, Peter -- fund our movement by chipping in $18 or whatever they can afford at a time to support this mission. In contrast, my opponent Devin Nunes is swimming in corporate dark money -- and his dark money could completely drown our message out if we don’t fight back, Peter! That’s why my team set an ambitious goal to raise $18,000 by Sunday night, but I’m seriously behind, Peter... But here’s the thing, Peter: If 1,000 people donate $18, I will reach my mid-month goal of $18,000 and be in the best spot to defeat Devin Nunes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you, Phil Arballo | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. name: Conor Lamb
subject: Hey, they launched a fake website to smear my family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34010717/300639502/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1Y2Y4Yy02ZmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11RzueScm0mn1hTf-ctOpii8hMchHXZKSKj4378w7u4=)

Friend --

Less than a week after we launched this grassroots campaign for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania, Donald Trump's MAGA allies went on the attack. They created a fake TMZ website and put up flyers all over Washington trying to smear me and my family with ridiculous lies:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34010718/300639503/-794016914?refcode=em21_210813_tmz-dc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1Y2Y4Yy02ZmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11RzueScm0mn1hTf-ctOpii8hMchHXZKSKj4378w7u4=)
---

This kind of nonsense makes us all angry. But there's a reason they're doing it:

They are afraid of us, friend.

But we've been here before. We aren't afraid of them. And we want it more than they do.

[**If you're offended by this desperate smear attempt on my family, please rush a donation of $5 or more to help us build the kind of grassroots movement that can counter their lies with the truth.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34010719/300639504/-794016914?refcode=em21_210813_tmz-dc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1Y2Y4Yy02ZmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11RzueScm0mn1hTf-ctOpii8hMchHXZKSKj4378w7u4=)

Truth hurts.

Trump's Republicans hate to hear it, and don't want to run against our campaign. They lie about everything -- our election, your paycheck and health care, my family.

They'll keep lying, and we'll keep telling the truth.

Together, we'll crush them in 2022.

[**Please make a donation of $5 or more right now to help us fight back and win this election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34010720/300639505/-794016914?refcode=em21_210813_tmz-dc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1Y2Y4Yy02ZmZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11RzueScm0mn1hTf-ctOpii8hMchHXZKSKj4378w7u4=)

Thank you so much,

Conor Lamb

name: Team Sarah
subject: pickle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hey Peter!

You didn't hear from us last week, and we wanted to be as transparent as possible with you as to why. Give us a brief moment to explain the situation.

We were making updates to our email platform, when we ran into a bit of a pickle -- which meant we couldn't send you any messages for almost a week. It was an update we needed to make, and we won’t bore you with all the technical details, but the temporary lapse in our fundraising has us tracking behind where we need to be for the month of August.

Now, we’re not sharing this information with you to fool you into donating or to tell you the sky is falling. But the gap in our fundraising does come at a bad time. As you may know, Ron Johnson has begun directly attacking Sarah and this grassroots campaign. That means we need your help to collect enough resources to respond.

**[Can Sarah count on you to chip in just $5, or whatever you can, to fight back against Ron Johnson’s attacks? We’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 before our mid-month deadline to help us catch up on our fundraising. clean_body: Hey Peter! You didn't hear from us last week, and we wanted to be as transparent as possible with you as to why. Give us a brief moment to explain the situation. We were making updates to our email platform, when we ran into a bit of a pickle -- which meant we couldn't send you any messages for almost a week. It was an update we needed to make, and we won’t bore you with all the technical details, but the temporary lapse in our fundraising has us tracking behind where we need to be for the month of August. Now, we’re not sharing this information with you to fool you into donating or to tell you the sky is falling. But the gap in our fundraising does come at a bad time. As you may know, Ron Johnson has begun directly attacking Sarah and this grassroots campaign. That means we need your help to collect enough resources to respond. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = This is only the beginning of what Sarah will be up against in this race, Peter. Ron Johnson and his wealthy allies have seemingly unlimited resources to keep this seat red. And with Senate control on the line, there’s no doubt we will experience the full force of the Republican establishment. That’s why our plan is to build a people-powered team that will help us fight back with the full force of a grassroots movement down the line -- and you’re an important part of that plan. Grateful to you for sticking with Sarah and the rest of our team. Thank you, Team Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. name: Dena Cranley
subject: Hi there, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
Let me introduce myself: | Hi there, You may not know me yet, but I’m John’s wife, Dena. For the last eight years, as John served as Mayor of Cincinnati, many people have asked me what John is _really_ like. The answer is simple. With John, what you see is what you get. **Since the night I met John, his values have never changed or wavered.** And John doesn’t just talk about these values – every action he takes is in service to them. **John has dedicated his life to pursuing justice, righting wrongs, and lifting up the voices of others.** His values are deeply rooted in his faith, and they made him the leader, father, and husband he is today. [**Ohio is desperately in need of a leader with strong values, a tireless work ethic, and integrity. If you can, please chip in $25, or whatever you can, to become a Founding Donor to Team Cranley >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34011252/300643694/2029786986?refcode=em_JC_FR_Launch5_081321_l1&amount=25&refcode2=d518e921-71fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTE4ZTkyMS03MWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icTKy3_Oxw_6hjZTo_PVj6thHVSQPwUudKmuJJuP_Ew=) From co-founding the Ohio Innocence Project to free the wrongfully incarcerated, to prioritizing racial equity and fighting poverty as Mayor, to successfully leading Cincinnati’s comeback while the rest of Ohio struggled — John’s actions speak for themselves. **I’ve seen John bring hope back to Cincinnati. I know he can bring hope back to Ohio as governor, but he can’t do it alone.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34011253/300643711/2029786986?refcode=em_JC_FR_Launch5_081321_img&amount=25&refcode2=d518e921-71fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTE4ZTkyMS03MWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icTKy3_Oxw_6hjZTo_PVj6thHVSQPwUudKmuJJuP_Ew=) Together, we can make childcare more affordable, invest in our public schools, and make sure every worker is paid a living wage. **With John as governor, we’re going to start putting working families first again.** Friend, we’re building a new roadmap for Ohio, but first, we have to build a winning campaign. [**Any amount you can contribute goes a long way towards electing John — you can click here to donate whatever’s right for you >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34011254/300643718/2029786986?refcode=em_JC_FR_Launch5_081321_l2&amount=25&refcode2=d518e921-71fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTE4ZTkyMS03MWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icTKy3_Oxw_6hjZTo_PVj6thHVSQPwUudKmuJJuP_Ew=) John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: Let me introduce myself: | Hi there, You may not know me yet, but I’m John’s wife, Dena. For the last eight years, as John served as Mayor of Cincinnati, many people have asked me what John is really like. The answer is simple. With John, what you see is what you get. Since the night I met John, his values have never changed or wavered. And John doesn’t just talk about these values – every action he takes is in service to them. John has dedicated his life to pursuing justice, righting wrongs, and lifting up the voices of others. His values are deeply rooted in his faith, and they made him the leader, father, and husband he is today. = From co-founding the Ohio Innocence Project to free the wrongfully incarcerated, to prioritizing racial equity and fighting poverty as Mayor, to successfully leading Cincinnati’s comeback while the rest of Ohio struggled — John’s actions speak for themselves. I’ve seen John bring hope back to Cincinnati. I know he can bring hope back to Ohio as governor, but he can’t do it alone. = Together, we can make childcare more affordable, invest in our public schools, and make sure every worker is paid a living wage. With John as governor, we’re going to start putting working families first again. Friend, we’re building a new roadmap for Ohio, but first, we have to build a winning campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I hope to meet many more of you in the weeks and months to come as we build this grassroots movement from the ground up. subject: An Update on Holcomb-Crouch Inaugural Activities
disclaimer_text: paid for by ImagineIndiana, Inc
body:
Imagine Indiana’s attempt to be a first-time concert promoter came up short, so we’ve decided to cancel the August 19 Big & Rich concert ... |
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b3433a0116&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Friends,

Imagine Indiana’s attempt to be a first-time concert promoter came up short. Two concerts in two days proved too much for us to handle in the time we had. Therefore, we’ve decided to cancel the Big & Rich concert on August 19. Live Nation has been an extremely helpful advisor and partner throughout the process. All tickets purchased will be refunded immediately.

The Boots & Black Tie Gala on Saturday, August 21 is proceeding as scheduled. We’re looking forward to gathering with hundreds of friends, colleagues, and supporters to celebrate the victories of 2020 and the resilience of the Hoosier State. More information on the gala is available below.

clean_body: Don’t forget what’s at stake, Peter. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Peter, we’re reaching out to remind you how hard we worked under President Trump’s leadership to add strong, conservative justices to the Supreme Court of the United States. But now, the Democrats are threatening to “pack” the Supreme Court full of far-left socialist justices who will rubber stamp their extreme agenda and practically rewrite the Constitution of the United States. It’s horrible! The only thing that can stop their plan from succeeding is a Republican Senate Majority, and right now we’re one vote short. | | | | | | If the Left packs the Supreme Court, all bets are off. They’re already trying to end private property rights, lead a government takeover of our economy, and strip law-abiding Americans of their gun rights. Think of what else they’d try without the Supreme Court in their way! We’ll be direct, Peter: we need 2,635 more Grassroots Donors to step up by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to stay on track, and we’re counting on your support to meet our goal. | Thank you. Glenn Youngkin has earmarked $75 million from his personal fortune to bankroll his campaign. AND the Republican National Committee just announced they’re pouring millions into Virginia to help Glenn build a massive voter turnout operation. Look, we don’t have those endless resources. But we do have something better: you and the tens of thousands who have already stepped up and donated to our campaign. Thanks to you, we’re building the largest grassroots donor campaign Virginia has ever seen. And it’s giving us a real chance to win. That’s why we email you so much, Derek. Every time we send an email, hundreds chip in anything they can to do their part. Look, I know it’s a lot, but believe me — having Donald Trump’s handpicked guy as our Governor would be far, far worse. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for hearing me out — I hope this gave you a little more insight into our strategy and why it’s so important. Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I called out the Biden Administration for the anti-American policies which cede our energy independence to dirty oil and gas producers like Russia and Saudi Arabia. I also shared tips on winning political debates with young students and continued to call out leftist political leaders who want to reinstate oppressive COVID lockdowns and mask mandates.
As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FgolklVImin9b2BODfdXN_A9OAyV8PdW0znOsn7htGAiM5mda59X936_3oePAk6Nji9WwRHeYhdwSndgLPvCtxDJEOWkxxLX_3MGHMxvH21U5zPGqKe60PEL3tRtgyTtqIJ8g5MqC-ULI84fZP8GctVsFn5MefSSbWfph9R2y1s=&c=_bcDsGTrlRNeWUMETphQ8y7fVXHSWV6CHeqchcf2MxijAgDUKXNtlw==&ch=i8y_MTGTo3l_ZtBNdr7c3j_Jhyz5CR6gfVFw5U1p6H7YsNaA3brGsA==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FgolklVImin9b2BODfdXN_A9OAyV8PdW0znOsn7htGAiM5mda59X99CkfA9UPO73GMPau_d2fqVNX0qAk9TLxa4mJMx5B4O0mfGclqVxIdpfpdtW2GLmbXHD8PGfxIpgqSqLSWPcTYF9iAvW-LFN-kNwfxqQEKTS&c=_bcDsGTrlRNeWUMETphQ8y7fVXHSWV6CHeqchcf2MxijAgDUKXNtlw==&ch=i8y_MTGTo3l_ZtBNdr7c3j_Jhyz5CR6gfVFw5U1p6H7YsNaA3brGsA==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FgolklVImin9b2BODfdXN_A9OAyV8PdW0znOsn7htGAiM5mda59X99CkfA9UPO735VEe7mFRGa8aWW_PqFdoGUD3SwjqBEKhaYbdA4qo5m0J7EW4A46xDoppLt60eZC-cbS84BLkO0Os26h7UESlMUKa_PFxBgRMvPML_dmz3uo=&c=_bcDsGTrlRNeWUMETphQ8y7fVXHSWV6CHeqchcf2MxijAgDUKXNtlw==&ch=i8y_MTGTo3l_ZtBNdr7c3j_Jhyz5CR6gfVFw5U1p6H7YsNaA3brGsA==).

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FgolklVImin9b2BODfdXN_A9OAyV8PdW0znOsn7htGAiM5mda59X9wYwK6uoUFmREHew0arJSUdRtl9tlUsmWKs7c452pylz3Wxhd__hy7JyR4RrGCPJCca6Cd19ywX30OGBoABJz-Q3KMpP1AYTFw==&c=_bcDsGTrlRNeWUMETphQ8y7fVXHSWV6CHeqchcf2MxijAgDUKXNtlw==&ch=i8y_MTGTo3l_ZtBNdr7c3j_Jhyz5CR6gfVFw5U1p6H7YsNaA3brGsA==)
I had the honor of speaking to students at Young America's Foundation's National Conservative Students Conference in Houston, TX. Here was my message to these young patriots: the point of fighting in politics is to win. And in order to win in politics, you have to persuade.
So I laid out five tools of persuasion these students could use to win a debate with their leftist classmates. For the speech, I used the climate change debate as an example; but these tools can be utilized effectively in any debate:

1. Know your opponent's position so that your arguments are well-tailored to confront what they're actually saying.
2. Frame the debate. There's different ways to do this - but an effective one is to point out the tradeoffs of the left's policies.
3. Ask your opponent questions during a debate. Ask them in good faith. And it's especially good to ask questions you already know the answer to (hence tip #1 - know your opponent's position).
4. Keep a few facts in your back pocket. Facts that directly confront your opponent's claims.
5. Be a happy warrior. Smile. Don't be angry. Talk to your opponent, not at them.

Those are just a few tips for young patriots looking to make a positive impact on the world. My upcoming Youth Summit on September 12th will be a full day of life lessons and wisdom from legendary influencers and thought leaders like Tony Robbins, Ben Shapiro, Megyn Kelly, Michael Knowles, and many more.
This event is open to anyone between the ages of 14 and 24. We're almost at capacity but there is still time to sign up the teenagers and young adults in your life. All they have to do is apply to attend at [www.CrenshawYouthSummit.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FgolklVImin9b2BODfdXN_A9OAyV8PdW0znOsn7htGAiM5mda59X9yTDtRD5mpc9zq9Tdqly6YFlSxRny-VJpW89_QSSIU3-FRrD6sSVCW2wOlVEUKCoGMz85zGGSbYQuBlnhDt7XT99CmpkpynfdpHLtAWjZ4Kt&c=_bcDsGTrlRNeWUMETphQ8y7fVXHSWV6CHeqchcf2MxijAgDUKXNtlw==&ch=i8y_MTGTo3l_ZtBNdr7c3j_Jhyz5CR6gfVFw5U1p6H7YsNaA3brGsA==).

This is reaching a whole new level of stupid.
In an [open letter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FgolklVImin9b2BODfdXN_A9OAyV8PdW0znOsn7htGAiM5mda59X93yTrcoW5hxgOVhCM7qNeP_1pfefoGiLqkpTJtuhlZjpU5PpcYoLW2v2UK62ROpm1XPGE__iJ0IjPuPz10WzGeB1d4a7Nnvd6kOjY_RfladeNaPV0yVh9s5RGN_Ho8OBN9T0ZaCk2ObIGbU9gD5K4M8=&c=_bcDsGTrlRNeWUMETphQ8y7fVXHSWV6CHeqchcf2MxijAgDUKXNtlw==&ch=i8y_MTGTo3l_ZtBNdr7c3j_Jhyz5CR6gfVFw5U1p6H7YsNaA3brGsA==) the White House released this week - Biden is asking OPEC (foreign oil) to increase oil production in order to stop rising gasoline prices.
"Higher gasoline costs, if left unchecked, risk harming the ongoing global recovery."
No kidding.
But instead of asking a Middle East oil cartel to save America - the Biden Administration should stop implementing policies that make every possible attempt to DESTROY American oil and gas.
Cancelling the Keystone Pipeline. Halting domestic oil and gas drilling. Ridiculous electric vehicle mandates.
These policies are not just stupid, but anti-American.
We've known since Day One that Biden's agenda would cede American energy independence to dirty oil and gas producers like Saudi Arabia and Russia. And it's clear from Biden's letter that he's totally fine with that outcome.
We're never going to convince Radical Democrats to reverse their job-crushing policies. But we are going to kick them out of Congress in 2022.
But I need your help to do that. [Please chip-in any amount you can afford to help me defeat the Democrats in 2022.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FgolklVImin9b2BODfdXN_A9OAyV8PdW0znOsn7htGAiM5mda59X93yTrcoW5hxgDAlX3OL7Glfd0H0r05B3r7y5pMoTZ9gaHEY3Kax8Q5jztxshjl9ZqzMy_65rcKfT5ptBQOu0OG2XaNwu00J-Fv2Q6xv4fqXI52H_tO6ZpfhOXfbWP8uyJAa5sxQNG4oy6l1Y6LHtJ5mJPCjYaWX-JnLQyBbCFUQE3f0XtUwWNJCiTIYrfApVEeuFgpDS7ciCXrtiwP8gwIOUDsPXrbgz1Gb5eJ6nYu-mG5hRSHG8bcaROErBZGjtwfakCaxB_X3hb4VmCn5f7I-H8HGgZTIZEUnd70bkGeCRBh-CB6GJ4kxvGLV_xVWZnZ7bHd6_oojL&c=_bcDsGTrlRNeWUMETphQ8y7fVXHSWV6CHeqchcf2MxijAgDUKXNtlw==&ch=i8y_MTGTo3l_ZtBNdr7c3j_Jhyz5CR6gfVFw5U1p6H7YsNaA3brGsA==)

A few weeks ago I called out the CDC on the "game changer" data they used to justify the new mask mandates.
Remember the data they used was from a single study conducted in India. The study was rejected in peer review but the CDC used it anyway.
And now even the Washington Post, in a lengthy fact check article, is admitting that I was right.
But the damage from the new CDC guidelines is already done. We're seeing all over again lockdowns, unnecessary school closures, young children being forced to wear masks, and now "COVID passports."
The left's version of safety is looking more and more like being in prison. And since there are no limiting principles to their "compassion," prison is the natural end state of their agenda.
But I am going to keep fighting back against the tyrannical COVID policies they are forcing on the American people once again. Can I count on your support?

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I called out the Biden Administration for the anti-American policies which cede our energy independence to dirty oil and gas producers like Russia and Saudi Arabia. I also shared tips on winning political debates with young students and continued to call out leftist political leaders who want to reinstate oppressive COVID lockdowns and mask mandates. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | TO WIN, WE HAVE TO PERSUADE. HERE'S HOW WE DO IT. | == | == I had the honor of speaking to students at Young America's Foundation's National Conservative Students Conference in Houston, TX. Here was my message to these young patriots: the point of fighting in politics is to win. And in order to win in politics, you have to persuade. So I laid out five tools of persuasion these students could use to win a debate with their leftist classmates. For the speech, I used the climate change debate as an example; but these tools can be utilized effectively in any debate: 1. Know your opponent's position so that your arguments are well-tailored to confront what they're actually saying. 2. Frame the debate. There's different ways to do this - but an effective one is to point out the tradeoffs of the left's policies. 3. Ask your opponent questions during a debate. Ask them in good faith. And it's especially good to ask questions you already know the answer to (hence tip #1 - know your opponent's position). 4. Keep a few facts in your back pocket. Facts that directly confront your opponent's claims. 5. Be a happy warrior. Smile. Don't be angry. Talk to your opponent, not at them. Those are just a few tips for young patriots looking to make a positive impact on the world. My upcoming Youth Summit on September 12th will be a full day of life lessons and wisdom from legendary influencers and thought leaders like Tony Robbins, Ben Shapiro, Megyn Kelly, Michael Knowles, and many more. This event is open to anyone between the ages of 14 and 24. We're almost at capacity but there is still time to sign up the teenagers and young adults in your life. All they have to do is apply to attend at ==. | | | | == | | | | NOT JUST STUPID | == | == This is reaching a whole new level of stupid. In an == the White House released this week - Biden is asking OPEC (foreign oil) to increase oil production in order to stop rising gasoline prices. "Higher gasoline costs, if left unchecked, risk harming the ongoing global recovery." No kidding. But instead of asking a Middle East oil cartel to save America - the Biden Administration should stop implementing policies that make every possible attempt to DESTROY American oil and gas. Cancelling the Keystone Pipeline. Halting domestic oil and gas drilling. Ridiculous electric vehicle mandates. These policies are not just stupid, but anti-American. We've known since Day One that Biden's agenda would cede American energy independence to dirty oil and gas producers like Saudi Arabia and Russia. And it's clear from Biden's letter that he's totally fine with that outcome. We're never going to convince Radical Democrats to reverse their job-crushing policies. But we are going to kick them out of Congress in 2022. But I need your help to do that. == Can I count on your support? | | | == | | | | THE LEFT'S VERSION OF SAFETY IS LOOKING MORE AND MORE LIKE PRISON | == | == A few weeks ago I called out the CDC on the "game changer" data they used to justify the new mask mandates. Remember the data they used was from a single study conducted in India. The study was rejected in peer review but the CDC used it anyway. And now even the Washington Post, in a lengthy fact check article, is admitting that I was right. But the damage from the new CDC guidelines is already done. We're seeing all over again lockdowns, unnecessary school closures, young children being forced to wear masks, and now "COVID passports." The left's version of safety is looking more and more like being in prison. And since there are no limiting principles to their "compassion," prison is the natural end state of their agenda. But I am going to keep fighting back against the tyrannical COVID policies they are forcing on the American people once again. Can I count on your support? | | | == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS NATIONAL REVIEW: == WSJ: == CBS-DFW: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | By providing your phone number, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (ckq.io/49500) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Team Crenshaw to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply. | | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)
---

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I'm asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I'm already lucky that you opened this!

**Here 's my elevator pitch to you**: I need you to know my background, why I'm running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I'm going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I'm running for public office.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)

I'm the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army's Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012\.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)
---

We've lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we 're new parents, we've had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can't just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that's made America great.

I'm running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left 's agenda doesn't sit right with me. I didn't serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can't stomach it anymore, so I'm running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I'm asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn't in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)**.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don't work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren't following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won't you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128181:62DWJ4lNB:m:1:3253819041:22BDE352CB9EA0A6E6B2E82D07F128DF:r)**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
---

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Before the weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we’ll keep this brief.
[**Before the weekend begins, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210813-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1142_6688874_uqm8O7&akid=1142%2E6688874%2Euqm8O7)
Last month, CNN named us one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
And to make things worse, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to get comfortable. National Republicans think they can take back this seat in 2022, and the fact that Trump is already attacking us at rallies means they are serious.
Mark needs our support to hold this seat and the best way we can do that is by making sure we have the resources to run another strong campaign and win a full six-year term to the Senate.
**Your support will go a long way, so please use the link below to make a donation today:**

Team Kelly

clean_body: Friends — we’ll keep this brief. Last month, CNN named us one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. And to make things worse, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to get comfortable. National Republicans think they can take back this seat in 2022, and the fact that Trump is already attacking us at rallies means they are serious. Mark needs our support to hold this seat and the best way we can do that is by making sure we have the resources to run another strong campaign and win a full six-year term to the Senate. Your support will go a long way, so please use the link below to make a donation today: Thank you for all that you do, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

This is an opportunity that cannot be missed. Can you chip in $3 at this crucial moment to defend our House Majority? EVERYTHING is on the line >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)**
We don't have a moment to spare.

**FIRST:**

President Biden called on us to protect our House Majority with everything we've got:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_9~)

**BUT THEN:**

National Republicans broke **FIVE** monthly fundraising records in a row -- _and now have**$7 MILLION** more at their disposal than our Democrats!_

**SO NOW:**

**[We're calling for an IMMEDIATE surge of support -- 3,OOO gifts strong -- to stop this Republican momentum in its tracks, turn the tide, and DEFEND our House Democrats once and for all. Can we count on your $3 before midnight?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Don Jr., Sec. Pompeo, Sen. Cruz, and more
body:
onald Trump Jr. was there. Candace Owens was there. Senator Ted Cruz was there. Secretary of State Mike Pompeo was there. Dan Bongino was there. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c370%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=TAgEjxKlp8Q6J5I6iYdBRA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65909%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yltw1KPtKk7sQjwFKmBTxA&sysid=1) Friend, **_Donald Trump Jr._** was there. **_Candace Owens_** was there. **_Senator Ted Cruz_** was there. **_Secretary of State Mike Pompeo_** was there. **_Dan Bongino_** was there. And so were 4,000+ patriotic Turning Point USA (TPUSA) students, who love our nation and will lead the future of American Greatness. **At TPUSA’s Student Action Summit in July -- the largest gathering of conservative students in the nation -- conservative leaders, speakers, and heroes inspired young people to take the fight to the radical Left and WIN the American Culture War, both on campus and online.** **And each of the exciting speakers told students THE TRUTH about America and what We the People really believe, including that:**
* We believe in American Greatness
* We believe in standing for the national anthem
* We believe that Free Speech is vital for our nation
* We believe in supporting law enforcement and keeping our cities safe
* We believe that we must stop the radical Left’s indoctrination of America’s young people
* We believe that we must fight to save the nation you and I know and love

[**If you’re a patriot -- and I believe you are -- I’m asking you to sign the American Values Declaration today to help me show TPUSA’s 400,000+ students activists and 80,000,000 online followers (the Turning Point Generation!) how many Americans stand with them. **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65900%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4C9o68GuACDbW%2fveAhVcEA&sysid=1) [**< << Sign the Declaration >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65901%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U95JtMl8ihxbAp7nGitYAw&sysid=1) Let’s show these young patriots that Big Tech, the liberal media, and the Left are all full of lies. Unlike what students today have been told by radical Leftist teachers and fake news, the majority of Americans don’t dishonor our nation and hate our founding. Instead, we want to fight to protect the very values that our Founding Fathers put forward and that our nation was built upon. [**Thank you for adding your name to this declaration!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65902%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B7%2fSSPeGP12B%2f6iALyBfLw&sysid=1) [**< << Sign the Declaration >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65903%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DOBf2T%2fVJiSjoCagp6aVmw&sysid=1) For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c370%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=TAgEjxKlp8Q6J5I6iYdBRA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c370%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=TAgEjxKlp8Q6J5I6iYdBRA&sysid=1)
