Fundraising is notoriously difficult during the summer, but our California Democrats can’t afford a slow down.

In 2018, **Katie Porter was the first Democrat ever to flip her congressional district** from red to blue, but Republicans are after her district with a vengeance.

_And they won’t just stop with our Democratic House seats, Peter._

**California Republicans forced our Governor Gavin Newsom into an unfair recall** \-- _and they’re outspending him three to one!_

The far-right may have deranged conspiracy theories and the worst corporate interests on their side, _but I believe in our grassroots movement._

I know if we all band together and chip in to meet our ambitious $7,500 goal, we’ll be able to secure the money Democrats need to beat this far-right movement.

name: Chief James Craig
subject: she REALLY said this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128583:JeZ3f4lmN:m:1:3253819041:630CF3A8F1F7E9F2A132652D23B12C7C:r) | |
---
Peter,

**What is the Left 's response to our concerns about rising crime in the wake of the Defund the Police movement?**

__**Tell us to "suck it up."**__

I'm not exaggerating. That is a DIRECT quote from Rep. Cori Bush, one of the most outspoken advocates of defunding the police.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128583:JeZ3f4lmN:m:1:3253819041:630CF3A8F1F7E9F2A132652D23B12C7C:r)

It's shameful. It's just another example of the "rules for thee and not for me" politicians across this country.

**My name is Chief James Craig, and I am the former Detroit Chief of Police. Not only do I reject the call to "Defund the Police," I believe we have a public safety crisis in America - and it's time we gave the police even MORE support.**

We all deserve to feel safe in our communities - not just those who can afford their own private security.

Peter, it's past time that our leaders started taking our public safety crisis seriously. I believe it's time to act.

And it's part of why the Michigan governor's race is attracting national attention: because I'm a veteran police chief who is unafraid to stand up to the elites when it comes to our police.

I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128583:JeZ3f4lmN:m:1:3253819041:630CF3A8F1F7E9F2A132652D23B12C7C:r)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128583:JeZ3f4lmN:m:1:3253819041:630CF3A8F1F7E9F2A132652D23B12C7C:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of that team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128583:JeZ3f4lmN:m:1:3253819041:630CF3A8F1F7E9F2A132652D23B12C7C:r)**
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128583:JeZ3f4lmN:m:1:3253819041:630CF3A8F1F7E9F2A132652D23B12C7C:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

**And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!"**

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128583:JeZ3f4lmN:m:1:3253819041:630CF3A8F1F7E9F2A132652D23B12C7C:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128584:JeZ3f4lmN:m:1:3253819041:630CF3A8F1F7E9F2A132652D23B12C7C:r)

clean_body: | | Peter, What is the Left 's response to our concerns about rising crime in the wake of the Defund the Police movement? Tell us to "suck it up." I'm not exaggerating. That is a DIRECT quote from Rep. Cori Bush, one of the most outspoken advocates of defunding the police. It's shameful. It's just another example of the "rules for thee and not for me" politicians across this country. My name is Chief James Craig, and I am the former Detroit Chief of Police. Not only do I reject the call to "Defund the Police," I believe we have a public safety crisis in America - and it's time we gave the police even MORE support. We all deserve to feel safe in our communities - not just those who can afford their own private security. Peter, it's past time that our leaders started taking our public safety crisis seriously. I believe it's time to act. And it's part of why the Michigan governor's race is attracting national attention: because I'm a veteran police chief who is unafraid to stand up to the elites when it comes to our police. I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020: " When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order. Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens. When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that? Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership. I don't see much of that out there. That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican. I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values. And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!" I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth. Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values. When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time. And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly. Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front. Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Chief James Craig Former Detroit Police Chief P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. subject: So, we should just “suck it up”?
body:
I will always back the blue!
---

| Dear Friends,
---
| Just recently, Squad member and activist for the radical socialist movement, Congresswoman Cori Bush (D-MO) showed the far left's utter hypocrisy when she tried to defend her shameless pursuit to defund the police while at the same time, saying her own paid security was a must. She told us hard working Americans to "suck it up" while defending her private security, but in the same sentence, demanded we give up ours. Just check out her comments here:
"... So, if I end up spending $200,000, if I spend ten more dollars on it--you know what? I get to be here to do the work. So suck it up. And defunding the police has to happen. We need to defund the police and put that money into social safety nets." But it isn't just Cori Bush. Politicians right here in Washington are continuing their push to defund the police at a time we're seeing skyrocketing homicides and crime rates all across our state and country. I have three young boys and every minute of every day, their safety is at the forefront of my mind. The safety of all Washingtonians will always be at the forefront of my mind.
But let's not forget - elections have consequences.
So now I'm asking you to take the next step to help us elect a real leader to the United States Senate, not a career politician who is going to sit quietly because they're afraid to go against their political party bosses in DC. I can't do this without your [support](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ivzVFO6wiMw9pK6isqtNaAvPkw9DEQEywQQhfPkIo7IaGhRUiiXHViYVe0ba5TsJCQRv1YyrQf6lBmxQB0UHbPwb5pAVrJpjjog3VYreWmuGgkIeozN-AptJiLLDu74tJ6SEp3H6vyqci3JaQGTUtEB987VONvvUZ5PwkrbdoKZL-_FDMI9PowHbGGIlBt9L&c=bICB5Zaa1JZYbpF6r8zBl6lgfqFlPSw79Y-cVb-SQ7DTA1N4kqgimQ==&ch=7ukxyIYVkbcDtnj31QV8ga5jL3z5gaEoi-xtqTkAPgwWh552mWBtVA==). Will you donate today? When I am elected, I'll work every day to put an end to the radical defund the police rhetoric and restore peace in our great state.
---

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: How we can fight the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34015286/300657267/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGY4ODNiNC03ZGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9pLEdrQZ_TUmrlw_cjlY3gBnvyiI_UPTbCjCCXDoTVI=&emci=5a899d23-5cfc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=00f883b4-7dfc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
This week, I had the honor of joining EPA Administrator Michael Regan, Congressman Raul M. Grijalva, State Rep. Andres Cano, and other environmental leaders at multiple events advocating for **bold climate action and investments to create new clean energy jobs in Arizona.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34015287/300657268/41694283?refcode=X_081321_ClimteActionEventRecap&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGY4ODNiNC03ZGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9pLEdrQZ_TUmrlw_cjlY3gBnvyiI_UPTbCjCCXDoTVI=)
---
We’ve been facing extreme heat and drought for decades and Arizona voters know it's important for us to be on the **frontlines of the climate crisis and the cutting edge of a clean energy future. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34015288/300657269/558373307?refcode=X_081321_ClimteActionEventRecap&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGY4ODNiNC03ZGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9pLEdrQZ_TUmrlw_cjlY3gBnvyiI_UPTbCjCCXDoTVI=)
---
By investing in clean energy, we can create **thousands of jobs** across the state and protect every Arizonan from the climate crisis. **Clean energy jobs are high-quality jobs.** They're better for the environment and for workers.
I'm passionate about this cause and will fight for our clean energy future when elected to Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34015289/300657270/558373307?refcode=X_081321_ClimteActionEventRecap&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGY4ODNiNC03ZGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9pLEdrQZ_TUmrlw_cjlY3gBnvyiI_UPTbCjCCXDoTVI=)
---
However, I can't win this fight alone. [**Will you join our grassroots campaign by making a contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34015290/300657271/558373307?refcode=X_081321_ClimteActionEventRecap&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGY4ODNiNC03ZGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9pLEdrQZ_TUmrlw_cjlY3gBnvyiI_UPTbCjCCXDoTVI=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34015291/300657272/41694283?refcode=X_081321_ClimteActionEventRecap&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGY4ODNiNC03ZGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9pLEdrQZ_TUmrlw_cjlY3gBnvyiI_UPTbCjCCXDoTVI=)

clean_body: Friend, This week, I had the honor of joining EPA Administrator Michael Regan, Congressman Raul M. Grijalva, State Rep. Andres Cano, and other environmental leaders at multiple events advocating for bold climate action and investments to create new clean energy jobs in Arizona. = We’ve been facing extreme heat and drought for decades and Arizona voters know it's important for us to be on the frontlines of the climate crisis and the cutting edge of a clean energy future. = By investing in clean energy, we can create thousands of jobs across the state and protect every Arizonan from the climate crisis. Clean energy jobs are high-quality jobs. They're better for the environment and for workers. I'm passionate about this cause and will fight for our clean energy future when elected to Congress. = However, I can't win this fight alone. = = = Thank you for all that you do, Kirsten Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christopher=20Ekstrom?=
subject: Defeat the 19 RINO Senators!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
We have too many traitors in the Senate |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=e15bb91256&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

Some of them, you knew were rotten.

Some, are new to the list of the RINO traitors in the Senate.

Together, they helped pass a pork-laden $1.2 trillion bill, that is loaded down with bad Socialist policy that our grandchildren will pay for- and will cause inflation today.

Are you angry yet? [That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=956326095e&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden and the radical Left- not helping Biden pass his agenda.

Have you heard of the betrayal this week? 19 Republican Senators (including lots from safe seats) joined with the Dems to pass a HUGE infrastructure bill. This is one of Biden's biggest policy objectives, and as usual, there is more here than it seems.

_Hidden in its 2702 pages are plans to implement a pilot program to track your vehicle miles for a new highway tax. The proposed plan will also enable the US government to track where you’ve been and your favorite hangouts.

Trump ripped Mitch McConnell on Tuesday over his support for the infrastructure bill.

Trump called McConnell “the most overrated man in politics.”

Trump ended by saying McConnell is working “hard to give Biden a victory” — and warned they are going for “the biggest tax increases in history” next._

As usual, President Trump is right. This is a boondoggle, filled with new taxes like a per-mile driving tax, kneecapping crypto-currency, and more. 2,700 pages of pork and Dem objectives and it was only made possible by weak Republicans.

Remember this when someone tells you a "bad Republican is better than a good Democrat". They are not.

I’m sick & tired of moderate/RINO one-way loyalty! RICHARD SHELBY actually back-stabbed our Conservative candidate for a damn Socialist Abortion supporter in 2018! But these (R)INO scumbags seek to enable the Socialist Agenda & ruin America!

[Will you help us defeat these traitor RINOs?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=755019dbe6&e=ba6e67b849)
---
|
---
| Some voted to convict Trump. Some voted for the Dems' pork-filled COVID bill that spent nothing to stop COVID. Many voted for Biden's awful nominees. Now some voted for the Biden's infrastructure bill.

**We cannot trust the Republicans in the Senate to do the right thing- many of them, anyway. We need to primary the worst offenders and remove them from office- it's the only way to whip the rest into line. **

The Dems don't have this problem. They all fall in line when time comes. They all voted against all of Trump's nominees, every one. We are sending the wrong people to DC.

We have been sending choir boys- but we need more America First fighters!

[Help us make an example](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9d85555fdd&e=ba6e67b849) of the RINOs by defeating them in primaries. _Trump is still fighting the Dems, and America needs us to join the battle!_

A RINO will always betray you the first chance they get, and every single time thereafter. [They are good for nothing, and need to be replaced!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9875135d92&e=ba6e67b849)

We will ONLY support Congressmen and Senators who stand with President Trump and against the Dems' agenda! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is crucial so we can hold them accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=dc45d353b9&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp hates us. They want to ignore us and do whatever the heck they want. [Help me bust this cartel up!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1ec805b27d&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,
---

---
| Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. We must defeat these enemies of the Republic!! [Donate right now to help us defeat them.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=3b4875a0fc&e=ba6e67b849)

Vote-by-mail ballots for California's recall election against failed leftist Governor Gavin Newsom will be mailed to **every registered voter** by August 16th - _just days away._

_**But some counties - including Los Angeles and Fresno - have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now!**_

clean_body: "The United States Could Finally Get A Four-Day Workweek" | = Peter, in case you missed it, I’m so excited to share that I have introduced legislation that will revolutionize workers' rights by reducing the standard workweek to 32 hours. = But Republicans and even some conservative Democrats HATE the idea of Americans working less hours. = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = After this brutal pandemic, working from home, job insecurity, childcare burdens and so much more, working families deserve a break. That’s why a 32-hour work week is SO important. It will change the way Americans live and work forever. And Peter, it's proven to work! This isn't some fantasy policy that has no basis in reality — there is hard evidence to prove that productivity actually increases with a 32-hour workweek, while simultaneously helping working families breathe. But we can’t win this battle if we sit back and do nothing. We have to stand up and fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you so much for your support. \-- Mark | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Fellow Conservative,

You may have heard that the Census Bureau released data from the 2020 census today which states will use to redraw the congressional maps for the NEXT DECADE.

**You ought to keep reading because this is extremely important.** Decisions made at the state level are going to have a direct effect on whether Republicans take back the House next year – and what the competitiveness of our Party will be in the next FIVE ELECTION CYCLES.

Based off results of the 2020 Census, six states – including my home state of Oregon – will be gaining a seat in Congress. What my campaign and I are afraid of is that the Democrat controlled legislature here in Oregon -- which is in charge of drawing the new maps -- will group all Republicans in the state into one single congressional district, **leaving my campaign for Congress dead in the water.**

**Here is where the details get granular and a bit murky:**
* Dems in Oregon have agreed to let Republicans help redraw the congressional map, but with only seven weeks in which to complete the new map, **how transparent are the leading self-serving, Democrat politicians really going to be?**

[**I have invested too much time and sweat equity running to represent the people of Oregon in the Congress for the last two years to let Oregon Democrats gerrymander the hell out of a map that should favor Republicans in two of Oregon’s five congressional districts. For that reason, I’m setting up a legal defense fund which I’m asking you to contribute to today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9057fa53e8a04968918cae40350a3d28&_e=RcHxQ9y3yiMC3MU-Jq_jRxuioMXdyVFVUA_DzxcVtXEZw9FaS4GUxCJ1AuGD14wR37cte5puOCbnBNO_pd8s3HrJXcGYRveue7RIuV4ulsiHwW0_Ow9dXyr4x5i4XWdhGNek2RtJ0Hc7HUgQ-hBoEw3pVA5xEquwpyDAgfi87XE29TX82fRDtHoaBu9R7EZI8u7UcRfs0bNSvhvA6TcPxBbSinjSgnkHt_JFKIn_zZYzvUce-x0XgorvQIQDzVpr6r0zl04-tYjHMaL5NGP6Wyoo8jBmmZY48KJlKAi7vO4nMo_I0MPS6qA2sOIGapE8CzOV_4EBQdfe8vkSY1U5Aw7uxPJJQokNPYgN4X9CeYWTOh1rfId59dCCEPVuCrtI0wBOqjnVTCDA5Oxf-rFUXU_sky8psMk-YE1qTtC_79asLYAU1STpnQD9g9irWjfrhiWFra4vfDmdYZuAmrwfaG7Wsfh1m5I2FVQU-Pe-GEk%3D)

subject: a huge victory

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34017919/300664695/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210813_X_PET_PL_X_ACT_US_all_all_PL_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Y2MzAwNS04OGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kcqGN8ZuC04LLHMpG6wpW3gRNwfwYMMyi6vOol3Eqc=&emci=b6f63005-88fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b7f63005-88fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

Folks, The New Mexico Game Commission just delivered a huge victory in the fight to ensure public access to our waterways! Did you know that your access to our rivers and streams is such a part of our birthright and our heritage that it’s in our state constitution? It’s absolutely true. That’s why I wrote to the New Mexico Game Commission a few months back urging them to reject applications from five landowners who want to restrict your access to the streams, rivers, and watercourses that run through their properties. It’s just plain wrong that any wealthy landowner or political donor would try to keep these waterways to themselves instead of recognizing that they belong to all New Mexicans. Yesterday, the commission made it clear: **They denied all five landowner applications.** This is a huge victory, folks. Waterway restrictions block folks who simply want to enjoy the waters that are theirs, whether through fishing, boating, hunting, or just wading through. But we have more obstacles to overcome in this fight. There’s a battle right now in state and federal courts to affirm, once and for all, that New Mexico’s waterways aren’t for the taking. In the end, it’s clear: We must end efforts by wealthy landowners to block your access to your streams and waterways. Rest assured, I am and will keep fighting. [**If you’re as committed as I am to keeping our waterways accessible to all, add your name next to mine to show your support:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34017920/300664697/734478380?refcode=MTH_em_20210813_X_PET_PL_X_ACT_US_all_all_PL_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Y2MzAwNS04OGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kcqGN8ZuC04LLHMpG6wpW3gRNwfwYMMyi6vOol3Eqc=&emci=b6f63005-88fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b7f63005-88fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34017921/300664699/734478380?refcode=MTH_em_20210813_X_PET_PL_X_ACT_US_all_all_PL_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Y2MzAwNS04OGZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kcqGN8ZuC04LLHMpG6wpW3gRNwfwYMMyi6vOol3Eqc=&emci=b6f63005-88fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b7f63005-88fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

name: John Castorani
subject: Hillary Clinton's lies cost lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_s=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_t=wDCENhIeTR9K6bSCUSofQz8ZgQ3QSH94H589x3jxk-jxl70urIF79O2uIIASBTaNRGtDOLshQGdsP7Wx8Tv59uRqbQnXiUaLDvuXh_NUeIbeKXWDA9UasyVqxOrmftIOzER8n2eVewZZbtl0GJVz48UEza3LvxRcjWEV5sHVb9M%3D) | [](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJcsgCqqkx0L44ymw4CXpTCl212_9hiWlifTRtzaE2gDR6o4NHIML5Pcris4r3TRQDSrtPHAoB-gyIhBK6U8CP3VR3wAeIOTZRRfP9ZWW7MMfDVTE2kdoCxmQCZTe_VU5WXHolQXXOo8IWCLROTev3zsVB_O_KotchsQtUBLQsEkTc7fIOdl3yHwesC96iow-S8VZJ6YfGR4J5m6jkRD8BvVE%3D)
---

Peter,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJchFJOC2g1TWeC4_rD2T3lOtp1nFN0zeiNVGto_rRDuLUygie95pelNfuv2SEFk-jMqdOey8VHNlsCahiPIUN7HZMFW5nhH4uqys0Ko-ymur6ecpAOa_4JJHv9vqTf9Q9-OzBIVxkpSwGD6-7wN5yB-W-Zcyq6Oy9kyZKlsh6A571fhxK0ASYJ4egRTusZEzkRMVpnJvi2KzUFzYo2LIVpPs%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJcu1NPDRWNVkol4jpXtqF-CQZwfJQ4gV64Zmr7Cuab8v-RRsX_iVeEpKND5cWkJyQqDZXcwRoQ2XuwRbcZLKDEZ4pr7U5R1_m7z1oAhWEBslVkc8_7QuAnB28XymNfqngG-tJ7CjXANieavAL5csh9JiLWH0cJgshiaDq-xr4PSGEtbu57_4kkct_48HkIsVthkmjqjE6XwZBOpFJqNT8MFs%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJcuTGh6pZESKVY_qQHedeZrIxHO3VfxHsn40hQc-PT_LnWZn0bRci_9BQvXpem20vXJmRTc4P96qrk_6fBYs0vcnvpj9IgtpDZDpi7XC-pjMGAih_Qee_vta6Na0zA1Io4MG1_oQG02b-GvEM68UKLAKQ92IiWF7B9eYZcHDf-pWKbsUzDoqHENsIob7_4rs2lIRFuHIOYTNGiX53pjMr-pg%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJcvL3CSPv6rd1mmmDCPdmFySTNwHnHyLie8GzsbH80MY3l9XCngyOOUE_R3XuNKPEQ6DU2rKXTjeuOn85XXkQz2beu8oMWURWfIQjV6CsQzFU8i6QBpx1Ckz6MXJB4e5BFK0FYnfvaZ1J_OU2oXElY4xKlTKTIOwl_sUGVOryIQRlaL2HUHqaxsgxDisLnagxa10E5nhACngIgk6cz1ks0Eg%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJcg9uIFQJ7M1kDx87s7PpCPv8Ii4yM5OYN0kutdAVWapLrjTP5WF_gCKPcz4swyne7NmA-a8a4JEPYoDVvWht6wDoNFBFJHhCdr-qMiqIX5DM-395wiwabez8R3Z9MFGG-n2VkgOgym_24Zdpg-yqVqMWXBzcf86XkKssl5PZlc-BTfM6BPJd31Rg7Q7o1xhCzooabWBnqgKz9OWvi68ye00%3D) **

[](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJcshUxX56k7iPhfVl9p39OUgzr3IQ76AA6vx-hxWsOEsLqY1xECI3xiBirah9wpwOwMw93_msuGi9RMm7Jq_rjGPovrD3jlKuXsokzDAnmwO42eoxspQHGA6Kl6KoFTMxHe4Uz7EFHsLje27Yew03IzCXXeJ6JRzrWkqUhVvM3vVDxsf0PStH-6jrS8_07XkCm9GaDJoLAhSJ0TY7sQSLOqc%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJcg3DvA1mAAlqOVy7m8F-nmUGrBfBS26myXnsgm_yHustPGsTrYbzFizsr6AFFn176pCyES_Ebc3XW2_FsFSrQjlPxKZsu86c41viHuv5jkGTbuKIrjwp8revpRk0KRH7-e9d-Jvv_O8asJxGlb8rBacF0SnWrv3H9IBI7JB5KiJ-_Jv5gEJslAVQtzpYDGGH06JFtyz1d9oHeHJ0UOShuww%3D)**.

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=deaac9406be947189934f36b31b358c5&_e=C75eBPKx66ETd11qpU1DM3ICZfDeLO8EWHiTonrnjtkQlQUEoM7GdMXX_oPKjv5X9hVjaIumK3i7zHJqLAAzWHhTqBECrJUjPvxLyPxt1C4oUT2vgpUIg1rf6fYAnLAM32K-4ZBWpTeV_r73r4T-VSa870DysYxKwhBPTJooxsoA-UA1FHquL_HiAQfGwGFmtL5iLLCn3XOqE5nNdlSy9AZJRdWIjWfxUxkTJYYb2GVmOSpc95sNC5PnUgqbNfzrIJw278uEsOBhsW4bgueJciyOXn1OsGTvCTrn-u0nx3TyFbNj-UkVgZTv8mNsZ1Q6wPqsghVvAJV6xmmXQMba7IhiB2C8fcVMod_M3ZGiMGebyFA6KLj6ZeQATh-hDVuGc_2w1umA-ZdrEeD2oM-hQ3Vk5woiytMODxpKc4KR7Bm6e0qO0DFWq7xQ5hgXL9vytoawCiH53peHR_3jKJ3T59Zs4OKbZ-TUkjv845gdvks%3D)**

clean_body: For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

body:
We’re one week away from getting together for the boots and black tie inaugural ball! I’m looking forward to reconnecting with many of you ... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470774?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_One Week Away_** We’re one week away from getting together for the boots and black tie inaugural ball! I’m looking forward to reconnecting with many of you for our delayed celebration of the successful 2020 election. So many of you made Governor Holcomb’s historic reelection possible; from making calls, to knocking doors, to collecting signatures, and so much more. Next Saturday is a celebration of our entire incredible team. It’s a celebration delayed, but I know it will be worth the wait. Ticket and sponsorship information is below!

Last weekend I had the honor to serve as emcee for the St. Joseph County Lincoln Day Dinner. We heard from several of our great statewide leaders, including Secretary of State Sullivan and Auditor Klutz, as well as Congresswoman Jackie Walorski. It was the largest Lincoln Day Dinner in county history. I was glad to be a part of it. Thank you Chairman Potts and the entire team for such successful event!

Thanks
Kyle

**_Photo: _**_Chairman Hupfer serves as master of ceremonies for the St. Joseph County Lincoln Day Dinner_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_New Beginnings in Indiana_**
**Governor Holcomb** visited Purdue University's Hypersonic Ground Test Center on Monday. This space will serve as a center for aerospace innovation right here in Indiana!

**Governor Holcomb** stopped by the Rolls-Royce manufacturing campus in Indianapolis after they announced their $600 million investment into the local factory.
**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb at the Purdue University Hypersonic Ground Test Center and Gov. Holcomb at Rolls-Royce Indianapolis._
---
|
---
| _**Holcomb-Crouch Inaugural Events**_
You are invited to join us for our Holcomb-Crouch inaugural events! Purchase tickets at [www.imagineindiana.org](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0001239911&e=1acd9bb3d6).

**Congressman Greg Pence** [urges the VA to support local veterans](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff32eb441c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[shares about inflation in America](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fe47949265&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a97f4fdb9fe498e91e0102ce074468e&_e=VXaN-xGQs-A2qMtXOpj0eKxlRZ3qH3Mz3W1qlPOyUlvDH8Uq_8kK2UoW0sD4SoMHijl2QFhhIOXFurUl6fGc5QexcsEUN_s4bIFwsHUHBE78BM-oV4VsRcAzCt1NMvs4rKDX5TPPd1VEL6S3XdWdRS4jZhEOzsDYHARXnbTmmGn_VwJFSDwEtcF9tg1Nx08zUdl1PxlR3WbTFcbI0FRrqGhR8HIgMYAQNA0j_fXwxOsckG5doobMf083YdpmiE8cPsDLWZA5XJhEkBZj47ZbuliwiEZFMwoAe6z5J7i3Ep4iWHpCL_OYb2idEWdkC1iS5HUWlQ-bpzf5n7uUR9AnGuyrG74sHGwvDms-SLj8disTLc2auCx1MncAa7irUNHJ-oOsEL5Us-rhIMbUv50TgdxuPhKlIlpkdvK-9pojUE8lV7c8f5s2y-MwFVhtOPDyK1a5_U-BwvT66oMVdxcJui-BusR6fpDfKU-B0R4rPGo%3D)
---

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a97f4fdb9fe498e91e0102ce074468e&_e=VXaN-xGQs-A2qMtXOpj0eKxlRZ3qH3Mz3W1qlPOyUlvDH8Uq_8kK2UoW0sD4SoMHijl2QFhhIOXFurUl6fGc5QexcsEUN_s4bIFwsHUHBE78BM-oV4VsRcAzCt1NMvs4rKDX5TPPd1VEL6S3XdWdRS4jZhEOzsDYHARXnbTmmGn_VwJFSDwEtcF9tg1Nx08zUdl1PxlR3WbTFcbI0FRrqGhR8HIgMYAQNA0j_fXwxOsckG5doobMf083YdpmiE8cPsDLWZA5XJhEkBZj47ZbumHmOQs7p-LRNTNCqnU1WPPwxKK8uYUzjpsxNBvesRBHI0uQVlinbZdc1J28OwW8xGEEC4GGsBb1Qpy3Y1fRAiX4lL5RkgITqowCXsMRnaC1EwuMr8FyYETtOWePTcDRwfTHc94GqG4ei2qFNbyHNyPpQZiMFf6Az5DwrZ3B4Zt1XQhpb9CtBfpyw-OSnidzU_B9b5tQG5x_p0HYswuQBG8%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a97f4fdb9fe498e91e0102ce074468e&_e=VXaN-xGQs-A2qMtXOpj0eKxlRZ3qH3Mz3W1qlPOyUlvDH8Uq_8kK2UoW0sD4SoMHijl2QFhhIOXFurUl6fGc5QexcsEUN_s4bIFwsHUHBE78BM-oV4VsRcAzCt1NMvs4rKDX5TPPd1VEL6S3XdWdRS4jZhEOzsDYHARXnbTmmGn_VwJFSDwEtcF9tg1Nx08zUdl1PxlR3WbTFcbI0FRrqGhR8HIgMYAQNA0j_fXwxOsckG5doobMf083YdpmiE8cPsDLWZA5XJhEkBZj47ZbuiJwM5CpP8Ayyqa13SiXT7PUvWk_8JXBRzEdkT8qduGYIZ4O_ctjN3lFoDkm_Ede5hMSuB4IRIhNlyqEAfzB7fYj8286tMtaC7m7UH-oYO9hSl6hBO2_Ha-c44RXe3EAnlpzesf0D9OYX_AdnyHK_bFcrz80CTNnlgDLCUOIpOOWBRxw4YBvLD6ROqhev3nqXaAfIpL0SpzwOjid7vo2nUM%3D)**.

This is a serious issue, Derek, and it’s one that matters to a lot of Virginians.

Just last month, the Attorney General of Mississippi urged the Supreme Court to do away with _Roe v. Wade_ — _this time, for good._

**And now, with an expanded ultra-conservative majority on the Court, reproductive rights for people across the country are under serious threat.**

This issue has never been more pressing than it is right now, and I need to know where you stand. **[Do you support protecting reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34018622/300666944/-2039609765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNjOGI0My04YWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctxP0pa8k_K14ECwlejWPSyQHPpkv4FgePTWvrUXSC0=&emci=d7ca20d5-5ffc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac3c8b43-8afc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)**

With my Republican opponent Glenn Youngkin vowing to defund Planned Parenthood and ban abortions if he wins, we desperately need to stop him.

And Derek, because we can’t trust that the Supreme Court will uphold these rights, **Virginia’s governor will be the last line of defense.**

We’ve got to work together to defeat Glenn Youngkin and his anti-women, anti-reproductive health agenda — the future of Virginians’ health care decisions depends on it.

**[So I’m asking once more: Will you stand with me and defend reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34018625/300666947/-2039609765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNjOGI0My04YWZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctxP0pa8k_K14ECwlejWPSyQHPpkv4FgePTWvrUXSC0=&emci=d7ca20d5-5ffc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac3c8b43-8afc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)**

As our children go back to school and we continue to face the impacts of this pandemic, I know this is still a challenging time for many across our state and country. Friends, As our children go back to school and we continue to face the impacts of this pandemic, I know this is still a challenging time for many across our state and country. Over the past two months, I’ve been traveling all over Iowa to hear from folks directly about the issues impacting them, their families, and their communities. Iowans have said they want to see our state government defend our right to vote, protect our environment and take action on climate change, and allow our local school districts to make the decisions that are best for them, whether that’s requiring masks in schools or giving our educators the freedom to teach as they see fit. And most of them feel that our current Governor is just far too extreme for Iowa. [_**As I continue to travel the state and build out my campaign for governor, I want to hear from you, too. Will you take my super quick August survey to let me know what issues concern you the most right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34019039/300667820/473839914?refcode=fl_email_su_20210813survey_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2NmOTk3MC04Y2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHdKDSTpfiCZ399HWxNutdrNmN9dvbbfy0E2e5tx2mI=&emci=5ded0644-35fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=07cf9970-8cfc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) [_****_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34019040/300667821/473839914?refcode=fl_email_su_20210813survey_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2NmOTk3MC04Y2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHdKDSTpfiCZ399HWxNutdrNmN9dvbbfy0E2e5tx2mI=&emci=5ded0644-35fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=07cf9970-8cfc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) | [take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34019041/300667822/473839914?refcode=fl_email_su_20210813survey_rs_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2NmOTk3MC04Y2ZjLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHdKDSTpfiCZ399HWxNutdrNmN9dvbbfy0E2e5tx2mI=&emci=5ded0644-35fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=07cf9970-8cfc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Let’s PRIMARY Adam Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128630:JbiUn4lqN:m:1:3253819041:7A1FD6E0986A48345EFC641D12A1FC93:r) | |
---
Peter,

My name is Catalina Lauf, and I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have an R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Politicians like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue._**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

_He 's gone all in with the fake news. Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128630:JbiUn4lqN:m:1:3253819041:7A1FD6E0986A48345EFC641D12A1FC93:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are all doing dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128630:JbiUn4lqN:m:1:3253819041:7A1FD6E0986A48345EFC641D12A1FC93:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

_That 's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it. _

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. He's working for them, after all.

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed cabal of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.
[**> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58128630:JbiUn4lqN:m:1:3253819041:7A1FD6E0986A48345EFC641D12A1FC93:r)
Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Don’t let them block Medicare expansion, child care, climate action, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, this just in — nine moderates have announced they will try to stop a bold jobs and families package that makes transformative investments in working people and our communities:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210813?refcode=em20210813-537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=537_420207_GNXxX_&akid=537%2E420207%2EGNXxX_)
We’re going to keep saying it: **Democrats need to be the party that delivers for the people****.** That doesn't just mean improving roads and bridges — it means improving _lives._ THAT’S why voters delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House.
**[This isn’t over and we know Pramila isn’t going to back down from her fearless advocacy and support for a package that fully invests in _us_ and our communities _._ Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford so we have the resources to keep growing our movement and pass the jobs and families package?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210813?refcode=em20210813-537&t=21&refcode2=537_420207_GNXxX_&akid=537%2E420207%2EGNXxX_)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210813?refcode=em20210813-537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=537_420207_GNXxX_&akid=537%2E420207%2EGNXxX_)**
Workers, families, and communities across America need child care, paid leave, education, Medicare expansion, a roadmap to citizenship, affordable housing, climate action, lower prescription drug prices, and other investments in their health and well-being.
Blocking this from passing means blocking these priorities — and we can’t allow it. Voters delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House — **now we need to deliver for them on these popular, necessary, and urgent priorities ASAP.**
[**If you agree that we should deliver and not delay, chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to our campaign today. Now is not the time to let up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210813?refcode=em20210813-537&t=23&refcode2=537_420207_GNXxX_&akid=537%2E420207%2EGNXxX_)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

body:
|
---

| | Peter, Democrats barely held onto the House in 2020, and Republicans know they only need to flip a FEW seats to make Kevin McCarthy Speaker of the House. Yesterday, McCarthy found himself one step closer to holding the Speaker's gavel when Democratic Congressman Ron Kind announced his retirement, opening up a clear path for McConnell to flip one of the most competitive swing districts in the country. And on top of that, Kind BARELY squeaked out a victory last cycle, beating Republican Derrick Van Orden by just two points. Orden is already running for this seat again. And now that there's a vacancy, he has a clear shot. Let's be clear: Orden is the worst of the worst. He was among the domestic terrorists who stormed our Capitol on January 6. And as if that isn't bad enough, Orden has a terrifying record. He has shouted Trump's Big Lie from the rooftops. He found himself in the spotlight after making anti-Semitic comments, and he even touted his own history of sexual harassment and abuse of female military officers. **And with Kind announcing his retirement, Orden is now the frontrunner.** But our Progressive Recruitment Fund will recruit a true progressive to excite voters and ensure Derrick Van Orden never again sets up shop in the U.S. Capitol. The fund will recruit a candidate who supports universal healthcare, a $15 minimum wage, and who will address the climate crisis. And most importantly, we will recruit someone who can win. If we can ramp up our budget for the Progressive Recruitment Fund, we will have a real shot at protecting our House from Derrick Van Orden and Kevin McCarthy. clean_body: | | | Peter, Democrats barely held onto the House in 2020, and Republicans know they only need to flip a FEW seats to make Kevin McCarthy Speaker of the House. Yesterday, McCarthy found himself one step closer to holding the Speaker's gavel when Democratic Congressman Ron Kind announced his retirement, opening up a clear path for McConnell to flip one of the most competitive swing districts in the country. And on top of that, Kind BARELY squeaked out a victory last cycle, beating Republican Derrick Van Orden by just two points. Orden is already running for this seat again. And now that there's a vacancy, he has a clear shot. Let's be clear: Orden is the worst of the worst. He was among the domestic terrorists who stormed our Capitol on January 6. And as if that isn't bad enough, Orden has a terrifying record. He has shouted Trump's Big Lie from the rooftops. He found himself in the spotlight after making anti-Semitic comments, and he even touted his own history of sexual harassment and abuse of female military officers. And with Kind announcing his retirement, Orden is now the frontrunner. But our Progressive Recruitment Fund will recruit a true progressive to excite voters and ensure Derrick Van Orden never again sets up shop in the U.S. Capitol. The fund will recruit a candidate who supports universal healthcare, a $15 minimum wage, and who will address the climate crisis. And most importantly, we will recruit someone who can win. If we can ramp up our budget for the Progressive Recruitment Fund, we will have a real shot at protecting our House from Derrick Van Orden and Kevin McCarthy. We've set a goal to immediately raise $5,000 to keep McCarthy out of the Speaker's chair and Orden out of the House chamber. But our resources are EXTREMELY low, and we're $4,249 short of our $5,000 goal. = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = We cannot thank you enough. It's because of your support that we can recruit a strong progressive to run in the wake of Rep. Kind's retirement and keep Orden out of Congress. We witnessed firsthand the damage inflicted upon our Capitol when rioters and right-wing extremists forced their way in on January 6 \-- we cannot sit idly by and allow one of them to hold the key to the front door. Thank you for your commitment. Together, we will protect the House. = | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. All contributions are made to support When Democrats Turn Out PAC's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. name: Josh Mandel
subject: As a father
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh
body:
As a father I felt compelled to write a piece on the debate about masking our children for the upcoming school year.

Please take a minute to read below and let me know your thoughts.

Thanks,
Josh **End Mask Mandates At School And Give Rights Back To The Parents**
by: Josh Mandel
August 12, 2021
The Daily Caller
[https://dailycaller.com/2021/08/12/mandel-end-mask-mandates-at-school-and-give-rights-back-to-the-parents/](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=9e0bab34406d40f7b5234617bdac8649&_e=bNv4Eovk1GDmbRNov8jiCTrXZjp6Jnk39GO1TKPa3fIh2U4qpYP2aLAkzKc21JCROgJQn94FwvYIWMcMnfMMSWWrGg92ab3avK58rQxy8IDch8vZU8fMm5A-F9Nq2Dgu8jh6paD7YBLhijJLswUcVKSC1NxcXaGKtkQscifGGXvU962Ayp43FJ1RlMa6NOze_mwIDQJ36czVt33uBCWEaMunSSpGf1DfqT5-YZvHEXSyeo885L7j7p_VuNr_HNm3gSQUDrwt95Ky8De7m3AWeaQezQwMWrBNXeew2ZXjnEa0DUCjpWjrMdyitOS96x0qVezg2JL2Mlp5dv-EfoRZBLE0kY1RjnC2g0rHcerHTg5WEzRgLlAXr2qlD1dM-dyh) On the issue of mask mandates, I stand with moms and dads fed up with so-called leaders who pass the buck and wash their hands of problems. I stand with parents who go to war to protect their children and who stand for liberty against COVID tyranny. There has been enough abdication of leadership in Ohio to last a generation, enough hot potato passing by a classic protector of establishment interests, Gov. Mike DeWine. It’s time for leaders who will take a stand and fight for the liberty and freedom of parents to make decisions on what’s best for our children. It’s time for our kids to stop being pawns in this endless political charade. It’s time to give rights back to parents. “If you faint in the day of adversity, your strength is small.” This warning from Proverbs 24:10 might as well have been written for Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine. While other governors have risked the ire of the radical left by leading and prohibiting mask mandates, DeWine has passed the political hot potato to faceless bureaucrats at school districts, empowering them to gladly trample on our kids’ well-being and our liberty. And for what? To protect children from a variant less deadly than accidental drownings? Are we stopping children 12 and under from entering swimming pools or Ohio lakes? Where does this end? Because of the lack of efficacy of masks – look at Sweden where 1.8 million children were sent back to school without masks, and there wasn’t a single COVID-19 death – DeWine is putting his own fright of making decisions over the freedom and liberty of our kids. And don’t think for a single second that the next phase won’t be to shut down schools again, sending children back to the isolation of the last year, and the associated problems of loneliness, depression and increasing suicide rates. Make no mistake about it, mandating masks at schools is tantamount to child abuse. Here’s an idea: leave it to parents to decide what’s best for our children. Let us determine whether our child should wear a mask at school, or whether in-person learning is right for our child. No longer can the bureaucrats argue this is a health issue – not when the data shows so few children are at risk – this is an issue of freedom and liberty. If you think parents aren’t onto this whole political charade, look at the outraged moms, like the ones of Sycamore Township in the Cincinnati area. At first, there were just ten of them launching a protest against mask mandates. Then overnight it blew up. Hundreds joined them. Parents were fed up with bureaucratic edicts that had little to do with the health and well-being of their children, and that amounted to a tremendous trampling of liberty, especially for young children. The Sycamore moms backed down the school bureaucrats almost overnight. They made masks optional. The media and the squishy establishment politicians say that money is the most powerful force in politics, but I beg to differ. I believe the most powerful force in politics is a motivated group of moms. For any political battle I’m waging, I’d take an army of moms over a war chest of money any day of the week. And as our jelly-kneed governor Mike DeWine washes his hands of all responsibility and gives parents little assurance that their kids will be put first, moms are activating in a big way. Democracy in action is a sight to behold, and I am inspired to join moms across Ohio as we fight to end mask mandates in schools and give the rights back to us parents. _Josh Mandel is the former Treasurer of Ohio and U.S. Senate candidate for Ohio._ | | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=9e0bab34406d40f7b5234617bdac8649&_e=bNv4Eovk1GDmbRNov8jiCcRfU6T7jUb5cudl7v9CFbaCC_53DqOcgijJCkacTpwqhvBOwflUwyG9Nu1BtTLfC7dqOIPB7xPHy9AakhonMW-mDinD9rXfeDoBz-Vlat15BiwVHK3-qw7DP4SeDAbwxEHrfKzDIaiFpzU5mOcWckaAOPQWTw14D_gulLXv2IgfwjNh_rbgVjcwYwZE07ILDl2H77Hce9jEN9SevN1lbxoxouWmXAc0hQDiwjDCA4qy0TgYiuXxFYXw45Wdw-Lqyg%3D%3D) | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=9e0bab34406d40f7b5234617bdac8649&_e=bNv4Eovk1GDmbRNov8jiCcRr75777uaumeoKOfB4PXGaMouVtV3N28cVybPBkfuivMroPCuYy3-ctlFRbx3RfAQ_lkqRRpvO9sKJtCxjpuQv5M87DUEbOzQ5e6ZKrmAluIceZs1sCkYmRvXPcEu-qGA_V7FuVPy-Cfrr__-MrwAE63TldqC6xIxLq0G_B5hwkNSwinLOZarwA-U6ikkBtB7GztAEd-sc835Xpb6KJ68aYyAsF5XpMOvydpbxa9w372VAi6WJGjcp0axqK3DytQ%3D%3D) | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=9e0bab34406d40f7b5234617bdac8649&_e=bNv4Eovk1GDmbRNov8jiCd1xNhaar8CIXeD_lXuDm2BPEeC-8MvHKcSeLTaO_F6HBR5i13aiJKLgSNKiif6t4u20xMPao-A2s7Faq8Nry7sLi2yniEsEOvw5kATwg99y2pHfMOEORfQCiqDiIx9_YqrBt6j93MkIQlIFF1kx7mpEd677cnkt9PNKWquWlT4DpVTStFZ-HQAcfZ38ko-Kl_MiTIXntXW8u1KAylWzmQ-Q4l5XWu3PNrhc9MIOCrwtWw-NsAwGAa4iO_5xC9Y-i3aOKwaJZvFzJG86PQa04os%3D)

clean_body: As a father I felt compelled to write a piece on the debate about masking our children for the upcoming school year. Please take a minute to read below and let me know your thoughts. Thanks, Josh End Mask Mandates At School And Give Rights Back To The Parents by: Josh Mandel August 12, 2021 The Daily Caller On the issue of mask mandates, I stand with moms and dads fed up with so-called leaders who pass the buck and wash their hands of problems. I stand with parents who go to war to protect their children and who stand for liberty against COVID tyranny. There has been enough abdication of leadership in Ohio to last a generation, enough hot potato passing by a classic protector of establishment interests, Gov. Mike DeWine. It’s time for leaders who will take a stand and fight for the liberty and freedom of parents to make decisions on what’s best for our children. It’s time for our kids to stop being pawns in this endless political charade. It’s time to give rights back to parents. “If you faint in the day of adversity, your strength is small.” This warning from Proverbs 24:10 might as well have been written for Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine. While other governors have risked the ire of the radical left by leading and prohibiting mask mandates, DeWine has passed the political hot potato to faceless bureaucrats at school districts, empowering them to gladly trample on our kids’ well-being and our liberty. And for what? To protect children from a variant less deadly than accidental drownings? Are we stopping children 12 and under from entering swimming pools or Ohio lakes? Where does this end? Because of the lack of efficacy of masks – look at Sweden where 1.8 million children were sent back to school without masks, and there wasn’t a single COVID-19 death – DeWine is putting his own fright of making decisions over the freedom and liberty of our kids. And don’t think for a single second that the next phase won’t be to shut down schools again, sending children back to the isolation of the last year, and the associated problems of loneliness, depression and increasing suicide rates. Make no mistake about it, mandating masks at schools is tantamount to child abuse. Here’s an idea: leave it to parents to decide what’s best for our children. Let us determine whether our child should wear a mask at school, or whether in-person learning is right for our child. No longer can the bureaucrats argue this is a health issue – not when the data shows so few children are at risk – this is an issue of freedom and liberty. If you think parents aren’t onto this whole political charade, look at the outraged moms, like the ones of Sycamore Township in the Cincinnati area. At first, there were just ten of them launching a protest against mask mandates. Then overnight it blew up. Hundreds joined them. Parents were fed up with bureaucratic edicts that had little to do with the health and well-being of their children, and that amounted to a tremendous trampling of liberty, especially for young children. The Sycamore moms backed down the school bureaucrats almost overnight. They made masks optional. The media and the squishy establishment politicians say that money is the most powerful force in politics, but I beg to differ. I believe the most powerful force in politics is a motivated group of moms. For any political battle I’m waging, I’d take an army of moms over a war chest of money any day of the week. And as our jelly-kneed governor Mike DeWine washes his hands of all responsibility and gives parents little assurance that their kids will be put first, moms are activating in a big way. Democracy in action is a sight to behold, and I am inspired to join moms across Ohio as we fight to end mask mandates in schools and give the rights back to us parents. Josh Mandel is the former Treasurer of Ohio and U.S. Senate candidate for Ohio. | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County Republican Party Federal Account. PO Box 24875, Mayfield Heights, OH 44124

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Heidi St. John is in the news again and an update on medical freedom.
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friends,
Washington State has never felt less free. Do you feel it, too?
The un-scientific and draconian mask mandates are back. Our K-12 employees are being told they must get an experimental vaccine or risk losing their jobs. Our health care workers and first responders, who just a few short months ago were hailed as heroes for their front line work, are being threatened with loss of employment for simply wanting bodily autonomy. The freedom to choose what is best for their own bodies is the new civil rights issue of our day.
The United States medical theocracy, under the direction of the Biden Administration and the discredited and dishonest CDC, has made its position very clear: your freedom is conditional--and they make the conditions.
Well, not on my watch.
As your Congresswoman, I will always stand for medical freedom. I will defend our Constitution and remind Washington elites that our rights come from God, NOT from government. I will stand against vaccine passports, lockdowns and mask mandates. We must be free to choose what is best for ourselves and our families.
The government's job is very simple: to protect our freedom, our borders and our national security. It's time to stand together. Together, we can turn the tide of totalitarianism that is threatening our way of life and restore America to the great nation that our founding fathers gave us.
---

clean_body: click to remove yourself from our emails list Dear ghetoprito, Welcome to the Enterprise Plus? membership experience. Your Enterprise Plus member number and user name is HYFYF4W. Your membership delivers faster reservations and rentals, a special members-only line at major airport locations and exclusive discounts.
