name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, In just 7 months, Joe Biden and his liberal allies in Washington have forced multiple crises on the American people. July saw the most illegal border crossings **in 21 years**. Consumer prices spiked again at 5.4%, the highest it’s been **in 13 years**. Joe Biden is begging OPEC for more oil production after killing the Keystone XL Pipeline on his first day in office. The Taliban are overrunning Afghanistan after Biden’s disastrous withdrawal. These are just some of the many reasons Jane Timken is working so hard every day to secure the votes of Ohioans. We must take back the majority in the U.S. Senate and we cannot do that without a candidate who can beat Tim Ryan next November. Jane Timken is the grassroots, America First candidate who can get the job done. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane Timken on the Hugh Hewitt Show** On Thursday, Jane joined the Hugh Hewitt Show to talk about the campaign and the issues concerned Ohio voters bring up to her every day. Jane spoke passionately about our children’s health and education. We need to put parents back in charge of their children’s health and education choices, not the government. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=8a7beade21d24367b5f4bf8152b60fe0&_e=3H75Ut7ZLtVczSXcR2fZLellsCIIp2n8mIuuzvqPH2oxErt5DG5zIL7yL21Oa5d_GN9EZgFUzxPw83fMclEakQd179XdonOF13jIRXAqo-cFbwRkuoKO15PbDJkEuUABrEdj1GzaJ4xRZ6Myjc3KsNAXMVCi1r50CeJzpIF3GiJqhWvvJN7ZE7VIuNFZ3Hld8mEExYSr5e1QC4J1SztBZr_iFEA24QMD2idcCwBC1USa3LC508FOeATrNhZTt-Rp84Wv2Un4uO2pnIvq2ynpyA%3D%3D)
**From the Trail**
Last Friday night, Jane was honored to receive an invitation to the Pro Football Hall of Fame’s Enshrinees’ Gold Jacket Ceremony.
On Tuesday, Jane continued her statewide listening tour on Critical Race Theory and our children’s education with concerned parents in Columbus. Jane was joined by two moms who have fiercely stood against CRT in their school, Columbus Academy.

Parents across the state are waking up to the radical ideology liberals in our education system are trying to force on our kids.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=8a7beade21d24367b5f4bf8152b60fe0&_e=3H75Ut7ZLtVczSXcR2fZLcqiCWGzPEIjneSp9iZD8thL63Isd5C6S0d2Y4PLZXwdqIQIQ1ZOp6wCqr5_Y44yYavQF-6ZR1ZxZZLgPj3-DAjGQ27loTRdtMVPtzGU_QQjrU2ncvU6Ba1Q9Qk904mO4_0Qn9-mYIPcFciSOjinjx-0r_m6Z_VhNC3JCBpZCxDRytvPeZhqb5EsJFTDpqDioVNGvqUSE4ibPryfr85U3zYHi6ZjQL_XmOHJ39Zfw21tMSw94chGvpeEZdYuxnpeYXGGRmdZVlq2zKUDxHhlAcvxIiyNPNW2-1kQCdh461bH)
**1951 or 2021?**
As some of you may know, Jane worked her way through college, cleaning bathrooms and working catering events to receive a good education. She then graduated law school and served her community as a successful attorney, Magistrate, and law clerk. In addition, Jane has served on countless community and charitable organizations. This is all before she broke the glass ceiling and became the first female Chair of any major party when she ousted John Kasich’s handpick Chair of the Ohio Republican Party. She then transformed that organization and turned it into one of the most successful state party organizations in the county.

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e61b0d965fcb44c1ae09f2402c103507&_e=VJK7i1kaTUXJkgerbXEmSOXQZUtc4Bs2oxAHcXE_zNf73q6lq9_WGRMbq-Bfz-uKdtI4wjwgYpgTSSSiyo27Hey35cLhoNtIN-0SID2uHfsKB4bk9TCl7-559NeWA99ITG3OK2NbeliuE8Al7y1cjQdPXylYkWglSuCNtEC5UiOgRybaSn6OxMqQZWiG5hvifjKv4lieVEqeIAIrC5hY_2a6_07p0UeVcaDN7fastao90H5nEDYCennVNSfFSpwHEP6g7IWGOKYhJViyGuh4zdNAjPGTQ3vnsHW6lFrAUiWhARO_cSS85_kRjB9HxeW93kOp3074_aNKhCvWY0upZoniTVQdta8B4XU8Eg5sP-7PQITlN5_IPTxjAVgJA9AGcHXa2WQe4hA6wl5DsTYitrl4Ud-wFU0JUfeORDhOjNdwEo3sCbBD_5ewKtnaKpwVMQDZTmqNZitcy2_MC-Am7mfY8IdlNAUSrYC8XJYs2fACdIixuPAhQ8h6nkiEdxl2)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e61b0d965fcb44c1ae09f2402c103507&_e=VJK7i1kaTUXJkgerbXEmSOXQZUtc4Bs2oxAHcXE_zNf73q6lq9_WGRMbq-Bfz-uKdtI4wjwgYpgTSSSiyo27Hey35cLhoNtIN-0SID2uHfsKB4bk9TCl7-559NeWA99ITG3OK2NbeliuE8Al7y1cjQdPXylYkWglSuCNtEC5UiOgRybaSn6OxMqQZWiG5hvifjKv4lieVEqeIAIrC5hY_2a6_07p0UeVcaDN7fastao90H5nEDYCennVNSfFSpwHEP6g7IWGOKYhJViyGuh4zdNAjPGTQ3vnsHW6lFrAUiWk08hDiZqj7pTdkVnHP0XJW7I_K7ohBCjeqPs55OwvO8S52pzV0GuDwm5GaHH8HAQHOmqOiWJmzTlcoZWbig-M9dTYpBTlCJf0lu3T43Svw3jGL58umb1F7EMeuBON276biAw2f-diJRrgvcDDXutmPY_xbypjT3kMfiowwZfCiaQ_YB60ZgPf9RrpBVGnKchIKdfIXb7zKTCE3w-1gLNO)**.

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a CIA conference focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country. | We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great. I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us! I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas. Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills. But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. Key Democrats have been caught RED-HANDED abusing their power by not even following their own mask mandates. Here are just a few examples! 🚫 D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser officiating and attending a wedding without wearing a mask, despite her reinstatement of a city-wide mask mandate. 🚫 Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot attending Lollapalooza, one of the largest music festivals in the country. Despite her COVID-19 restrictions, she not only allowed the event to take place but she was seen backstage maskless with other celebrities. 🚫 Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez was caught putting on her mask for a photo and then immediately taking it off after. And last but certainly not least... Nancy Pelosi. As one of the most active members on the mask mandate enforcements, she certainly is eager to rip off her mask after a photo. When will the insanity end? It’s always been “rules for thee but not for me” with the Democrats. For our future, Mo Brooks

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek**,**
**
** This past week I joined fellow Republicans in Nashville at the RNC’s Summer Meeting. These meetings are a fantastic opportunity for states to share insight and experiences, as well as provide feedback on current issues of importance. At this particular session, carve out states unitedly expressed the importance of our current presidential primary calendar. Over 150 members united to hear from New Hampshire, Iowa, South Carolina, and Nevada to hear first hand why our current system is so functional. With Maryland National Committeeman Dave Bossie, North Carolina Chairman Michael Whatley, and Ohio Chairman Bob Paduchik as hosts of the event, we demonstrated strong support for the nominating calendar as it is.

I’m honored to serve on the RNC’s 2024 Presidential Nominating Committee and I appreciate RNC Chairman Ronna McDaniel for appointing me. With all 4 carve out states represented in this working group chaired by my colleague and friend Iowa GOP Chairman Jeff Kaufmann we are in the best position possible to defend our First-in-the-Nation Presidential Primary and our current nominating calendar for 2024.

As one last reminder, Linda Camarota is campaigning in Hillsborough 7 and needs all of our support to ensure a successful special election win! Whether you choose to donate your time or financial support, any resource is an asset to her campaign.**

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

clean_body: Keep up with NHGOP happenings! | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | Weekly Newsletter ** Note from Chairman Stepanek Weekly Governor's Glance **Upcoming Events House Republican Update Senate Republican Update Republican Spotlight Noteworthy News NHGOP Tweets NH Federation of Republican WomenNH Young RepublicansNH Federation of College Republicans | | Derek, This past week I joined fellow Republicans in Nashville at the RNC’s Summer Meeting. These meetings are a fantastic opportunity for states to share insight and experiences, as well as provide feedback on current issues of importance. At this particular session, carve out states unitedly expressed the importance of our current presidential primary calendar. Over 150 members united to hear from New Hampshire, Iowa, South Carolina, and Nevada to hear first hand why our current system is so functional. With Maryland National Committeeman Dave Bossie, North Carolina Chairman Michael Whatley, and Ohio Chairman Bob Paduchik as hosts of the event, we demonstrated strong support for the nominating calendar as it is. I’m honored to serve on the RNC’s 2024 Presidential Nominating Committee and I appreciate RNC Chairman Ronna McDaniel for appointing me. With all 4 carve out states represented in this working group chaired by my colleague and friend Iowa GOP Chairman Jeff Kaufmann we are in the best position possible to defend our First-in-the-Nation Presidential Primary and our current nominating calendar for 2024. As one last reminder, Linda Camarota is campaigning in Hillsborough 7 and needs all of our support to ensure a successful special election win! clean_body: | | | | What matters most to you Friend, These past few years we have seen how wrong the media and the pollsters are. That’s why we can’t trust the media to tell us what matters, we want to hear it directly from you! I want to know what issues are most important to you! Your opinion matters, it will help not only shape our campaign but help shape the rest of the nation's policies. Thanks, Team Kelly www.kellyforak.com | | | | ==

name: Jayla Gilliam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We need your help to get back on track.
#
It’s Jayla, Erica’s Finance Director. You’re an important member of our grassroots team, so I want to share something with you that not every campaign would: a snapshot of our ActBlue account:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9637?refcode=em20210813-339&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=339%2E3698%2EoYxn_r)
**As you can see, our fundraising this month has slowed down compared to last month.** Erica doesn’t have a rolodex of wealthy and well-connected donors to turn to, and she certainly doesn't have the blessing of the DSCC. So it’s a big deal when grassroots donations fall short.
[**Will you chip in $5 right now to help us raise the $3,391 we need to get back on track by Sunday’s mid-month fundraising deadline?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9637?refcode=em20210813-339&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=339%2E3698%2EoYxn_r)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9637?refcode=em20210813-339&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=339%2E3698%2EoYxn_r)**
North Carolina is already one of the most competitive U.S. Senate races of 2022, and there’s so much at stake.
Erica is the only candidate in this race who will fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, a living wage, and to abolish the filibuster. **That means if elected, she could be the deciding vote on these critical progressive policies.**
The only way we elect Erica and flip North Carolina’s Senate seat is by building a massive coalition of diverse, working-class people — but we need your support to do it.
[**So please, if you can, make a donation of $5 to our campaign. Every donation will make a direct and immediate impact on reaching our $3,391 mid-month fundraising goal and building a winning campaign.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9637?refcode=em20210813-339&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=339%2E3698%2EoYxn_r)
Thank you so much,
Jayla
Finance Director
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210813-339-footer&t=23&refcode2=339_3698_oYxn_r&akid=339%2E3698%2EoYxn_r)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=339%2E3698%2EoYxn_r)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=339%2E3698%2EoYxn_r)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Erica doesn’t have a rolodex of wealthy and well-connected donors to turn to, and she certainly doesn't have the blessing of the DSCC. So it’s a big deal when grassroots donations fall short. name: RepublicanEmails.org
subject: Do you want to meet President Trump, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans ([electrepublicans
body:
Now is your chance...

| Elect Republicans is devoted to organizing Grassroots Republicans and connecting them directly to the battleground campaigns that need their help. To update your email preferences, [click here](http://www.electrepublicans.org/email_preferences?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=512606115203048976_p&n=1).

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a6f0957350a84511b68a7f66dea1f11e&_e=58dYkv3QZdTwoUY0y1-JeWDG1b31fAxw_kjnR0xQEA1Wpm_Qxtar4Cu5ZsDjryUd6zza3JdjryJCabrB9sjLGllab2Ymyrk1sZ6XsZNU0V7YfpEDM9n8qcuosU-66OW3CicAei3Le8sPi7VkFnZjsTiTiDY0WGaGr1jJCyMMwRZ0cjXMkA8PaFipAEIo9v0w1KpNe3xS4vEDP_pQqiPwwC_1UT_HkTFgCCIPuNbV3tgM2q4zclZ3tnkyiZMnd9Q2JvI6g_31gkQopbyVfPPOqMpc3cKgyLIN9gh5CRiTkDa2w8-vdO40YftW5vDq0bLCzilCFMkjrhY1sin5Uz5H_Q1ahgB585CGYAWdwcc-Hkp0c1nMuFubCkGonQ548FjlTq_4AL3cWz5Vf0sZNpPryauR2OAa2mys0tZ3m5jHiGo%3D)
Knoxville photographer Amy Rievley found she was having trouble getting things done around the house. It got her thinking: what do other people, especially single moms like she, do when they need home repairs?

This question turned into a new business that is spreading all across Tennessee. Her goal? To help women and the elderly with home repairs at an affordable price. Kudos to Amy for her entrepreneurial and do-good spirit.

name: Tim Scott
subject: Uncle Tom. Token. Traitor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved.

|
---
| | | Friend,

My grandfather had to leave school as a third grader to pick cotton, and never learned to read or write. Yet, he lived to see his grandson become the first African American to be elected to both the United States House and Senate.

So when those on the left call me "token", "Uncle Tom" or a "white supremacist" it is more than just insults typed on a computer, they are words that hurt my soul.

_**[The radical Left doesn't care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they're attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a "white supremacist base".](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be8cfd5eafe24fa4adbba39863d24f14&_e=6JUdAAhghJvSoNtc_jQSlEByaelKYi7UyYzqHtXEVt6WjM55fXUEbkfpR82haqC8eNs2TdI9__kjEP3wpstFT7Os5y_p4pZcqZSGF-lt8WJuC9sTL5mO1rqzezcbQntm3ItG9O5WWA17Y1tY0xZWk1Mjl69ppQsEOyRsH0kMOhBD0bELjx-suPltJJ_40-GSMz-ZRAK1uGSGe0LY5c3bMbuhyDYfBVwpouyaiJS1kq3ELQkm0_qPkpVyklSk62wgdxlNfo6-HfhBRxDeFLcAcmoeT8igtOHTJFdx41tI6buIPGK5mGplz6AqMjR7-NAjrphx7sbBqPpM8-vVBedZTa84AK51Z4-kMJUFwnfEEYDkj5zYJPFRGp8l7JT3rGfNRg4fMDiW7gkxqMsIsTlrRC5liPZe7UchuDrP4KcesC6_VivRFeP2oMdzgH7U3z9GCQvsv9mS9Q_Jrk8xeHjAhtwXec_lYWuqCofVWYFgVmnMmOO7PiY49_Y6K25_6s3rmxztkfI9_IJRGBa0GyFX2bUjwvuCjRRenjIZPG5KlsA%3D "The radical Left doesn’t care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they’re attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a “white supremacist base”.")**_

Friend, these vile words and attacks should anger you. They represent the very worst of our politics. I strive every day to rise above it and work towards finding solutions for ALL Americans.
---
| | | [Stand with Me](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be8cfd5eafe24fa4adbba39863d24f14&_e=6JUdAAhghJvSoNtc_jQSlEByaelKYi7UyYzqHtXEVt6WjM55fXUEbkfpR82haqC8eNs2TdI9__kjEP3wpstFT7Os5y_p4pZcqZSGF-lt8WJuC9sTL5mO1rqzezcbQntm3ItG9O5WWA17Y1tY0xZWk1Mjl69ppQsEOyRsH0kMOhBD0bELjx-suPltJJ_40-GSMz-ZRAK1uGSGe0LY5c3bMbuhyDYfBVwpouyaiJS1kq3ELQkm0_qPkpVyklSk62wgdxlNfo6-HfhBRxDeFLcAcmoeT8igtOHTJFdx41tI6buIPGK5mGplz6AqMjR7-NAjrphx7sbBqPpM8-vVBedZTQQGe6v9mITPSprdKS0GJWVa3itDfEKayZMKuYgL2eyhkmao-svSHwoqgK4uSYGZUMlv1PLdIyhdIlFLDDnAKX-0McOrPoPS2UkvFfzMEDeTgygQuRHMqzt5xc0lodaZEzQ2JHJELwZTGSBPyi5wrfkK8vrJC9lhWgbl34YvXxDdc1JFNNzm0U-C8bO1jEHlLuGtqnptyKFb-ggbLr7F8O4%3D "Generic Button")
---
We cannot allow the Left to get away with their ongoing attacks against anyone who dares to think differently.

My family went from Cotton to Congress in one lifetime. And that's why I believe the next American century can be better than the last.

I know that the insults and attacks I face today are nothing like the injustice and hatred faced by my grandfather.

**But I know we can do better.

Friend, when you read attacks against me for daring to think differently, don't get discouraged. Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. **
---
| | | [Stand with Me](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=be8cfd5eafe24fa4adbba39863d24f14&_e=6JUdAAhghJvSoNtc_jQSlEByaelKYi7UyYzqHtXEVt6WjM55fXUEbkfpR82haqC8eNs2TdI9__kjEP3wpstFT7Os5y_p4pZcqZSGF-lt8WJuC9sTL5mO1rqzezcbQntm3ItG9O5WWA17Y1tY0xZWk1Mjl69ppQsEOyRsH0kMOhBD0bELjx-suPltJJ_40-GSMz-ZRAK1uGSGe0LY5c3bMbuhyDYfBVwpouyaiJS1kq3ELQkm0_qPkpVyklSk62wgdxlNfo6-HfhBRxDeFLcAcmoeT8igtOHTJFdx41tI6buIPGK5mGplz6AqMjR7-NAjrphx7sbBqPpM8-vVBedZTSbT_NRZJ54hMRJakQVGT8eMFOJ959T1H4TS1b1RxmEQVzD-bZHEiaAMgr-YzdJsdIqldJcZkBQNLeBHER-kCOaIQgGtEAMWfnP0KEzj-dk9jAO5arbaSA2XQmi87Oxr7R2U51NcDhM2iWkFjrn5R9f9rXp4QhEN0fdjyvwSe8xC9SBL7Z36dAPh5xqveXAGxlTMaP2zbx_8SMqqY5Qq_k4%3D "Generic Button")
---
There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream.

I pledge to you that I will fight every day to help ALL Americans achieve that dream and I won't back down from that fight even in the face of hurtful insults from the Left.

Tim Scott

clean_body: Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. | | | | Friend, My grandfather had to leave school as a third grader to pick cotton, and never learned to read or write. Yet, he lived to see his grandson become the first African American to be elected to both the United States House and Senate. So when those on the left call me "token", "Uncle Tom" or a "white supremacist" it is more than just insults typed on a computer, they are words that hurt my soul. "The radical Left doesn’t care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they’re attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a “white supremacist base”." Friend, these vile words and attacks should anger you. They represent the very worst of our politics. I strive every day to rise above it and work towards finding solutions for ALL Americans. | | | "Generic Button" We cannot allow the Left to get away with their ongoing attacks against anyone who dares to think differently. My family went from Cotton to Congress in one lifetime. And that's why I believe the next American century can be better than the last. I know that the insults and attacks I face today are nothing like the injustice and hatred faced by my grandfather. But I know we can do better. Friend, when you read attacks against me for daring to think differently, don't get discouraged. Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. | | | "Generic Button" There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream. I pledge to you that I will fight every day to help ALL Americans achieve that dream and I won't back down from that fight even in the face of hurtful insults from the Left. Tim Scott | | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Report from Sioux Falls Cyber Security Symposium
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
You won't believe this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=aac6741eef&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I have just spent the last couple of days in Sioux Falls with Mike Lindell for the Cybersecurity Symposium. [_Donate now to help me fight for election integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8d13074cce&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5c7de6aa5d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **What a whirlwind!**

Not even a day into the symposium and the live stream was already hacked...
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0fbe094f91&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Folks, this isn’t a joke. There is something deeper at play – this is why we have been attacked every step of the way, the audit, myself, the campaign, and every patriot leading the charge in America’s Audit in Arizona.

[_Please donate TODAY to help us fight back against these attacks and make sure that our elections aren’t subject to the same assault! Donate $25, $50, $100, $250 or more today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=41bd291777&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ba234e5501&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I want to break down to you why this is important.

**This means that the same key was applied to every county in every state. **

**_This is through publicly available data._**

When data is manipulated in the same way on the scale of the United States election, and the evidence is publicly available – either they think we’re idiots or they are more devious than we imagined.

**In either case, we cannot stand for this.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3dae84fb85&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| What I need you to see here is that there is a huge movement building, and we are making tremendous strides.

**From the initial hearings which I paid for _out of pocket _,__ to the historic Maricopa election audit, to documented evidence of fraud on a massive scale and tens of thousands of fraudulent votes, to a movement that is spreading around the country, there is more than enough evidence to suggest what I have been saying all along:**

**_The 2020 election was stolen from Republicans and Donald Trump._**

And this has been due in no small part to help from each and every one of you.

At its heart, this is a grassroots movement, and I have been blessed to be put in a position where I can speak on your behalf. This is what I do on a daily basis, traveling around the country, supporting America First patriots, advocating for election integrity on television shows, the news, and radio shows.

**This is my calling, folks, to defend the America that I love.**

[**_And I just can’t do it without your continued support._**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=962accaa2f&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Donate today to support election integrity and my campaign for Arizona Secretary of State!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=360407590b&e=44b8c466b0)

**There is a reason the #ProveIt movement is spreading like wildfire.**
**_More than half of America can’t be wrong._**

Cybersecurity specialists, election integrity patriots, constitutional defenders have gathered from around the country and reached a jarring but necessary conclusion.

_Our elections are only as safe as Republicans ensure that they are. Democrats can’t be trusted to protect our elections._

**This is why it is absolutely critical that I win the election for Secretary of State of Arizona in 2022.**

**_I am unafraid of the Radical Left, but I know what they are capable of. This is why I sleep with one eye open._**

So you don’t have to.

[**Will you help me?**

_Donate today to join the #ProveIt movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9feebffc3d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b7236749e3&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5804c7a96e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=87f3bc16d6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=87f3bc16d6).

clean_body: | | | We need your immediate attention: After Republicans introduced more than 4OO voter suppression bills nationwide, two of our most beloved Democratic heroes have teamed up to defend our democracy and SAVE voting rights! FIRST: Stacey Abrams called on Americans everywhere to fight back against Republican-led attacks on voting rights: THEN: Hillary Clinton sprang into action and joined Stacey in the fight: NOW: | We can't afford to let Stacey and Hillary down. NOT when Republicans are still fighting to avenge Donald Trump by attacking our voting rights. AND NOT when anti-voting rights Republicans are shattering fundraising records to defeat our House Majority. So please, will you chip in $3 to protect our House Majority before it's too late? | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Thank you, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

clean_body: Fox News is SO embarrassed: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. We couldn’t agree more, Fox News has been putting the health of millions of Americans in danger by peddling disinformation during this health crisis. But Fox News doesn’t care so long as they get the highest cable news rating. | | Listen, we’re disgusted by how easy it is for Fox News to intentionally lie to millions of viewers while COVID-19 cases RISE across the country. | We really appreciate your signature! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . body:
Did you vote yet?

Friend,

I need your input.

We are launching our **OFFICIAL TRUMP CARDS** soon, and my team asked me to select the design. _I 've always said the only voice that matters is YOURS,_ which is why I want YOU to be the one to pick our brand new card.

The card you select will be carried by Patriots all around the Country. They will be a sign of your dedicated support to our movement to **SAVE AMERICA,** and I'm putting my full trust in you.

I'll look for your response first thing tomorrow, Friend. Will I see it?

They will be a sign of your dedicated support to our movement to SAVE AMERICA, and I'm putting my full trust in you. I'll look for your response first thing tomorrow, Friend. Will I see it? Please cast your vote below for our brand new Official Trump Card. Thank you, Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Tina?=
subject: How long does it take to read 2,701 pages?
body:
Over 49 hours. | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=fbbca251fb&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

Over this past week, the Biden Infrastructure Bill got voted on and passed in both the House and Senate. This 2,701 page bill is _40,000 words longer_ than the novel Moby Dick and would take _49 straight hours_ to read!

Do you believe that any of the politicians who voted yes, read this bill? Shouldn’t we expect our legislators to at least read bills before shoving them through?

Even worse, this 1.2 TRILLION DOLLAR bill only has 10% that is “actual infrastructure”. Where is the rest of the 90% going? Can we even call it an “infrastructure” bill?

We need legislators that will ACTUALLY read our bills, not just blindly support what their party leaders tell them to do, like Abigail Spanberger.
---
[CONTRIBUTE TO AN HONEST LEGISLATOR ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=c1eac6bd72&e=ae0ea222da)

---
| But look, here are some other “infrastructure” items, included in this $1,200,000,000,000 bill:
* A per-mile user fee pilot program. Why are we paying so much money, when they are going to tax you again?
* The single largest investment in green energy
* Upgrading school buses and ferries to use electric power
* Strict tax regulations on cryptocurrency

We know Tina would do the right thing and not vote until she read the whole bill to make sure that this is best for the people of her district.

She understands what it takes to write policy and how to work across the aisle. She previously developed policies while working for the U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom and as a Foreign Policy Advisor for numerous members of Congress. She even helped start and direct the bi-partisan Congressional International Religious Freedom Caucus.

We need legislators like Tina, not blind puppet politicians.
---
[CONTRIBUTE TO AN HONEST LEGISLATOR ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=e08ad71c58&e=ae0ea222da)

---
| Thank you,

Team Tina
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TO AN HONEST LEGISLATOR ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=2e9ab524f7&e=ae0ea222da)
